I am working with a raspberry pi running the server edition of Ubuntu 24.04 LTS. I need to harden it based on CMMC Level 3, NIST 800-171, NIST 800-53, and FIPS controls, and state of the practice enterprise security. I need you to write some arduino code for a XIAO SAMD21 to set a PRM signal on pin 10 and read from an I2C Analog to Digital converter (ADC). The model for the ADC is ADS1115. It has 4 inputs, but I only need the value from A0. The reference voltage should be 5V and the maximum voltage on the ADC should be 3.5. It needs to be read and then converted from bits to a percentage. I would like the PWM level to default to 0 and to be set by reading from serial in. Please report the current PWM setting and the percentage converted from the ADC to serial out.

The gear emoji in the networks settings link is not rendering properly. Can you remove it?

That makes sense! Sometimes emojis can render as strange boxes or symbols depending on the device's font support or the browser's default character encoding.

I have removed the gear emoji from the "Network Settings" button at the bottom of the main page HTML.

Here is the updated code:
C++

#include <WiFi.h>
#include <Preferences.h>
#include <vector>

// --- NVS Storage ---
Preferences preferences;

// --- Wi-Fi Reconnection Timer Variables ---
unsigned long previousWifiMillis = 0; 
const long wifiInterval = 12000; 
bool wifiWasConnected = false;   
int currentWifiIndex = -1;

// --- Saved Networks Structure ---
struct WiFiCred {
  String ssid;
  String pass;
};
std::vector<WiFiCred> savedNetworks;

// --- Web Server Setup ---
WiFiServer server(80);
String header;

// --- Button Debounce Variables ---
unsigned long lastButtonMillis = 0;
const long debounceTime = 250; 

// --- Lamp Constants & Variables ---
const int pwmPin = 23;       
const int bootButtonPin = 4; 
const int highPWM = 255;
const int medPWM = 150;
const int lowPWM = 50;
const int minPWM = 10;

int currentPWM = 0;
int pwmOveride = 0;      
int lightState = 0;      
int lastLightState = 4;  
int printNow = 0;
unsigned long currentTime = millis();
unsigned long previousTime = 0; 
const long timeoutTime = 2000;

// --- Helper Functions ---

unsigned char h2int(char c) {
  if (c >= '0' && c <= '9') return c - '0';
  if (c >= 'a' && c <= 'f') return c - 'a' + 10;
  if (c >= 'A' && c <= 'F') return c - 'A' + 10;
  return 0;
}

String urldecode(String str) {
  String decoded = "";
  for (int i = 0; i < str.length(); i++) {
    if (str[i] == '%') {
      if (i + 2 < str.length()) {
        decoded += (char)((h2int(str[i+1]) << 4) | h2int(str[i+2]));
        i += 2;
      }
    } else if (str[i] == '+') {
      decoded += ' ';
    } else {
      decoded += str[i];
    }
  }
  return decoded;
}

// Loads Wi-Fi credentials from NVS Memory
void loadNetworks() {
  savedNetworks.clear();
  preferences.begin("wifi_creds", true); 
  
  int count = preferences.getInt("count", 0);
  for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    String sKey = "s_" + String(i);
    String pKey = "p_" + String(i);
    String s = preferences.getString(sKey.c_str(), "");
    String p = preferences.getString(pKey.c_str(), "");
    if (s != "") savedNetworks.push_back({s, p});
  }
  
  preferences.end();
  Serial.print("Loaded "); Serial.print(savedNetworks.size()); Serial.println(" networks from NVS.");
}

// Saves Wi-Fi credentials to NVS Memory
void saveNetworks() {
  preferences.begin("wifi_creds", false); 
  preferences.clear(); 
  
  preferences.putInt("count", savedNetworks.size());
  for (int i = 0; i < savedNetworks.size(); i++) {
    String sKey = "s_" + String(i);
    String pKey = "p_" + String(i);
    preferences.putString(sKey.c_str(), savedNetworks[i].ssid);
    preferences.putString(pKey.c_str(), savedNetworks[i].pass);
  }
  
  preferences.end();
  Serial.println("Network list saved to NVS securely.");
}

void applyLightState() {
  if (pwmOveride == 0) {
    if (lightState == 1) currentPWM = minPWM;
    else if (lightState == 2) currentPWM = lowPWM;
    else if (lightState == 3) currentPWM = medPWM;
    else if (lightState == 4) currentPWM = highPWM;
    else currentPWM = 0; 
    analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM);
  }
}

void playWifiConnectSequence() {
  Serial.println("Playing Whimsical Animation...");
  for (int pulse = 0; pulse < 2; pulse++) {
    for (int i = 0; i <= 255; i += 15) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(10); }
    for (int i = 255; i >= 0; i -= 15) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(10); }
    analogWrite(pwmPin, 0); delay(100); 
  }
  delay(200); 
  for (int i = 0; i <= currentPWM; i += 5) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(15); }
  analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM); 
}

void setup() {
  Serial.begin(115200);
  while (!Serial); 

  pinMode(bootButtonPin, INPUT_PULLUP);
  pinMode(pwmPin, OUTPUT);
  analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM); 

  loadNetworks();

  WiFi.mode(WIFI_AP_STA);
  WiFi.softAP("Blue Dot Lamp Setup", "password123"); 
  
  server.begin(); 

  Serial.println("System Ready.");
  Serial.println("AP Started. Connect to 'Blue Dot Lamp Setup' (Pass: password123)");
  Serial.println("IP address for setup: 192.168.4.1");
}

void loop() {
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 1. Handle Physical Button Input 
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  int buttonState = digitalRead(bootButtonPin);

  if (buttonState == LOW && (millis() - lastButtonMillis > debounceTime)) {
    lastButtonMillis = millis(); 
    Serial.println("Button Pressed!");
    lightState++;
    if (lightState > 4) lightState = 0;
    if (lightState != 0) lastLightState = lightState;
    pwmOveride = 0; printNow = 1;
    applyLightState();
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 2. Handle Serial Input
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  if (Serial.available() > 0) {
    int input = Serial.parseInt();
    while (Serial.available() > 0) Serial.read(); 
    if (input >= 0 && input <= 255) {
      pwmOveride = 1; currentPWM = input;
      analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM); printNow = 1;
    }
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 3. Handle Wi-Fi Connection Cycling
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  if (WiFi.status() != WL_CONNECTED) {
    wifiWasConnected = false;
    unsigned long currentMillis = millis();
    
    if (currentMillis - previousWifiMillis >= wifiInterval) {
      previousWifiMillis = currentMillis; 
      
      if (savedNetworks.size() > 0) {
        currentWifiIndex++;
        if (currentWifiIndex >= savedNetworks.size()) currentWifiIndex = 0; 
        
        String trySsid = savedNetworks[currentWifiIndex].ssid;
        String tryPass = savedNetworks[currentWifiIndex].pass;

        Serial.print("Attempting to connect to: "); Serial.println(trySsid);      
        WiFi.disconnect(); 
        WiFi.begin(trySsid.c_str(), tryPass.c_str()); 
      }
    }
  } else {
    if (wifiWasConnected == false) {
      Serial.println("\nWiFi connected to router!");
      Serial.print("Local IP address: "); Serial.println(WiFi.localIP());
      playWifiConnectSequence(); 
      wifiWasConnected = true;
    }
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 4. Handle Web Server Requests 
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  WiFiClient client = server.available();

  if (client) {
    currentTime = millis();
    previousTime = currentTime;
    String currentLine = ""; 
    
    while (client.connected() && currentTime - previousTime <= timeoutTime) {
      currentTime = millis();
      if (client.available()) {
        char c = client.read();
        header += c;
        if (c == '\n') {
          if (currentLine.length() == 0) {
            
            // --- API PATH: Add Wi-Fi Network ---
            if (header.indexOf("GET /add_wifi?") >= 0) {
              int sStart = header.indexOf("s=") + 2;
              int sEnd = header.indexOf("&", sStart);
              int pStart = header.indexOf("p=") + 2;
              int pEnd = header.indexOf(" HTTP", pStart);

              String newSsid = urldecode(header.substring(sStart, sEnd));
              String newPass = urldecode(header.substring(pStart, pEnd));

              savedNetworks.push_back({newSsid, newPass});
              saveNetworks();

              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:application/json\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");
              client.print("{\"status\":\"ok\"}");
              
              previousWifiMillis = millis() - wifiInterval; 
            }
            // --- API PATH: Delete Wi-Fi Network ---
            else if (header.indexOf("GET /delete_wifi?") >= 0) {
              int iStart = header.indexOf("index=") + 6;
              int iEnd = header.indexOf(" HTTP", iStart);
              String idxStr = header.substring(iStart, iEnd);
              int idx = idxStr.toInt();

              // Ensure the index is valid before deleting
              if (idx >= 0 && idx < savedNetworks.size()) {
                savedNetworks.erase(savedNetworks.begin() + idx);
                saveNetworks();
              }

              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:application/json\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");
              client.print("{\"status\":\"ok\"}");
            }
            // --- API PATH: Lamp Controls ---
            else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/") >= 0) {
              if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/on") >= 0) { lightState = lastLightState; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/off") >= 0) { lightState = 0; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/min") >= 0) { lightState = 1; lastLightState = 1; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/low") >= 0) { lightState = 2; lastLightState = 2; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/med") >= 0) { lightState = 3; lastLightState = 3; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/high") >= 0) { lightState = 4; lastLightState = 4; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/animate") >= 0) { playWifiConnectSequence(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/pwm?val=") >= 0) {
                int pwmStart = header.indexOf("val=") + 4;
                int pwmEnd = header.indexOf(" HTTP", pwmStart);
                String valStr = header.substring(pwmStart, pwmEnd);
                int newVal = valStr.toInt();
                if (newVal < 0) newVal = 0;
                if (newVal > 255) newVal = 255;
                if (newVal == 0) { lightState = 0; pwmOveride = 0; } 
                else { currentPWM = newVal; pwmOveride = 1; }
                analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM);
              }

              printNow = 1;
              String stateStr = "OFF";
              if (pwmOveride == 1) stateStr = "MANUAL OVERRIDE";
              else if (lightState == 1) stateStr = "MIN";
              else if (lightState == 2) stateStr = "LOW";
              else if (lightState == 3) stateStr = "MED";
              else if (lightState == 4) stateStr = "HIGH";
              else if (lightState == 0) stateStr = "OFF";

              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:application/json\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");
              client.print("{\"state\":\"" + stateStr + "\", \"pwm\":" + String(currentPWM) + "}");
            } 
            // --- PAGE PATH: Settings Page ---
            else if (header.indexOf("GET /settings ") >= 0) {
              
              // Generate the list of saved networks dynamically
              String networkListHTML = "";
              for (int i = 0; i < savedNetworks.size(); i++) {
                networkListHTML += "<li style='background:#333; margin:8px auto; padding:10px 15px; border-radius:5px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; max-width:300px;'>";
                networkListHTML += "<span>" + savedNetworks[i].ssid + "</span>";
                networkListHTML += "<button class='btn btn-off' style='padding:6px 12px; font-size:14px; margin:0;' onclick='deleteNetwork(" + String(i) + ")'>X</button>";
                networkListHTML += "</li>";
              }
              if (savedNetworks.size() == 0) {
                networkListHTML = "<p style='color:#aaa;'>No networks saved yet.</p>";
              }

              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:text/html\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");
              String settingsTemplate = R"rawliteral(
              <!DOCTYPE html><html>
              <head><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1"><title>Lamp Settings</title>
              <style>
                body { font-family: Helvetica; text-align: center; background: #121212; color: #fff; padding-top: 20px;}
                input { padding: 10px; margin: 10px; width: 80%; max-width: 300px; border-radius: 5px; border: none;}
                .btn { background-color: #2196F3; border: none; color: white; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer;}
                .btn-off { background-color: #f44336; }
                .btn-back { background-color: #555; margin-top: 30px;}
                ul { list-style-type: none; padding: 0; }
              </style>
              <script>
                function addNetwork() {
                  let s = encodeURIComponent(document.getElementById("ssid").value);
                  let p = encodeURIComponent(document.getElementById("pass").value);
                  if(!s || !p) return alert("Fill out both fields!");
                  document.getElementById("status").innerText = "Saving & Connecting...";
                  fetch("/add_wifi?s=" + s + "&p=" + p)
                    .then(res => res.json())
                    .then(data => { location.reload(); }); // Refresh to show the new list
                }
                function deleteNetwork(index) {
                  if(confirm("Are you sure you want to delete this network?")) {
                    fetch("/delete_wifi?index=" + index)
                      .then(res => res.json())
                      .then(data => { location.reload(); }); // Refresh to show the updated list
                  }
                }
              </script>
              </head>
              <body>
                <h2>Network Settings</h2>
                
                <ul id="network-list">
                  %NETWORK_LIST_PLACEHOLDER%
                </ul>
                <hr style="border: 0; height: 1px; background-color: #555; margin: 30px 10%; max-width: 350px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;">

                <p>Add a new Wi-Fi network:</p>
                <input type="text" id="ssid" placeholder="Network Name (SSID)"><br>
                <input type="password" id="pass" placeholder="Password"><br>
                <button class="btn" onclick="addNetwork()">Add Network</button>
                <p id="status" style="color:#4CAF50;"></p>
                <br>
                <a href="/"><button class="btn btn-back">Back to Lamp</button></a>
              </body></html>
              )rawliteral";
              
              settingsTemplate.replace("%NETWORK_LIST_PLACEHOLDER%", networkListHTML);
              client.print(settingsTemplate);
            }
            // --- PAGE PATH: Main Controller Page ---
            else if (header.indexOf("GET / ") >= 0) {
              String stateStr = "OFF";
              if (pwmOveride == 1) stateStr = "MANUAL OVERRIDE";
              else if (lightState == 1) stateStr = "MIN";
              else if (lightState == 2) stateStr = "LOW";
              else if (lightState == 3) stateStr = "MED";
              else if (lightState == 4) stateStr = "HIGH";

              String powerBtn = "";
              if (lightState == 0 && currentPWM == 0) {
                 powerBtn = "<button class=\"btn btn-blue\" onclick=\"sendCommand('/lamp/on')\">Turn ON (Restore)</button>";
              } else {
                 powerBtn = "<button class=\"btn btn-off\" onclick=\"sendCommand('/lamp/off')\">Turn OFF</button>";
              }

              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:text/html\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");

              String htmlTemplate = R"rawliteral(
              <!DOCTYPE html><html>
              <head><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1"><title>Blue Dot Lamp</title>
              <style>
                :root { --bg-color: #121212; --text-color: #ffffff; }
                .light-mode { --bg-color: #f4f4f4; --text-color: #121212; }
                body { font-family: Helvetica; text-align: center; background-color: var(--bg-color); color: var(--text-color); transition: background-color 0.4s, color 0.4s; width: 100%; padding-top: 20px;}
                .btn { background-color: #4CAF50; border: none; color: white; padding: 16px 30px; font-size: 20px; margin: 4px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 8px;}
                .btn-off { background-color: #f44336; } .btn-blue { background-color: #2196F3; } .btn-purple { background-color: #9C27B0; }
                .theme-btn { background-color: #607D8B; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 20px; margin-top: 20px;}
                .nav-btn { background-color: #333; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 20px; margin-top: 20px; color: white; text-decoration: none;}
                hr { border: 0; height: 1px; background-color: #555; margin: 30px 10%; }
                .slider { -webkit-appearance: none; width: 80%; height: 15px; border-radius: 5px; background: #d3d3d3; outline: none; margin-top: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
                .slider::-webkit-slider-thumb { -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 50%; background: #4CAF50; cursor: pointer; }
              </style>
              <script>
                function handleResponse(data) {
                  document.getElementById("state-display").innerText = data.state;
                  document.getElementById("pwmSlider").value = data.pwm;
                  document.getElementById("sliderValue").innerText = data.pwm;
                  let pBtn = document.getElementById("power-container");
                  if(data.state === "OFF") pBtn.innerHTML = '<button class="btn btn-blue" onclick="sendCommand(\'/lamp/on\')">Turn ON (Restore)</button>';
                  else pBtn.innerHTML = '<button class="btn btn-off" onclick="sendCommand(\'/lamp/off\')">Turn OFF</button>';
                }
                function sendCommand(cmd) { fetch(cmd).then(res => res.json()).then(data => handleResponse(data)); }
                function updateSliderUI(val) { document.getElementById("sliderValue").innerText = val; }
                function sendPWM(val) { fetch('/lamp/pwm?val=' + val).then(res => res.json()).then(data => handleResponse(data)); }
                function toggleTheme() {
                  document.body.classList.toggle("light-mode");
                  let tb = document.getElementById("theme-btn");
                  if (document.body.classList.contains("light-mode")) tb.innerText = "Switch to Dark Mode";
                  else tb.innerText = "Switch to Light Mode";
                }
              </script>
              </head>
              <body>
              <h1>Blue Dot Lamp</h1>
              <h3>Current State: <strong id="state-display">%STATE_PLACEHOLDER%</strong></h3>
              <div id="power-container">%POWER_PLACEHOLDER%</div><br><hr>
              <div>
                <input type="range" min="0" max="255" value="%PWM_PLACEHOLDER%" class="slider" id="pwmSlider" oninput="updateSliderUI(this.value)" onchange="sendPWM(this.value)">
                <p>Custom Brightness: <strong id="sliderValue">%PWM_PLACEHOLDER%</strong></p>
              </div><hr>
              <div>
                <button class="btn" onclick="sendCommand('/lamp/min')">MIN</button>
                <button class="btn" onclick="sendCommand('/lamp/low')">LOW</button>
                <button class="btn" onclick="sendCommand('/lamp/med')">MED</button>
                <button class="btn" onclick="sendCommand('/lamp/high')">HIGH</button>
              </div><br>
              <div><button class="btn btn-purple" onclick="sendCommand('/lamp/animate')">Play Animation</button></div>
              <hr>
              <button id="theme-btn" class="btn theme-btn" onclick="toggleTheme()">Switch to Light Mode</button><br><br>
              <a href="/settings" class="nav-btn">Network Settings</a>
              </body></html>
              )rawliteral";
              
              htmlTemplate.replace("%STATE_PLACEHOLDER%", stateStr);
              htmlTemplate.replace("%POWER_PLACEHOLDER%", powerBtn);
              htmlTemplate.replace("%PWM_PLACEHOLDER%", String(currentPWM));
              client.print(htmlTemplate);
            }
            break;
          } else {
            currentLine = "";
          }
        } else if (c != '\r') {
          currentLine += c;
        }
      }
    }
    header = "";
    client.stop();
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 5. Report to Serial Monitor
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  if (printNow == 1) {
    Serial.print("PWM Set: "); Serial.print(currentPWM);
    Serial.print(" | lightState: "); Serial.print(lightState);
    if (pwmOveride == 1) Serial.print(" [SERIAL OVERRIDE]");
    Serial.println("");
    printNow = 0;
  }
}

Now the button is clean text. Are you ready to dive into OTA (Over-The-Air) updates next?

Can you update this so that it only creates the setup wifi after failing to connect to one of the saved networks?

That is an excellent idea. Having the ESP32 broadcast its own "Setup" network 24/7 when it doesn't need to is "noisy" for your Wi-Fi environment and presents an unnecessary security footprint.

To make this work, I've added a tracker called attemptsInCurrentCycle.
Here is how the logic now flows:

    At Boot: If you have zero saved networks, it turns the AP on immediately. If you have saved networks, it starts in stealthy WIFI_STA (Station) mode and begins trying them.

    The Failsafe: If it cycles through your entire list of saved networks and fails to connect to any of them, it automatically flips on the AP so you aren't locked out.

    The Cleanup: If it successfully connects to a router (either right at boot, or later after you update the password via the AP), it gracefully shuts the AP back off and goes back to stealth mode!

Here is your upgraded, dynamic-AP code:
C++

#include <WiFi.h>
#include <Preferences.h>
#include <vector>

// --- NVS Storage ---
Preferences preferences;

// --- Wi-Fi Reconnection Timer Variables ---
unsigned long previousWifiMillis = 0; 
const long wifiInterval = 12000; 
bool wifiWasConnected = false;   
int currentWifiIndex = -1;
int attemptsInCurrentCycle = 0;  // Tracks how many times we've tried connecting
bool apActive = false;           // Tracks if the Access Point is currently running

// --- Saved Networks Structure ---
struct WiFiCred {
  String ssid;
  String pass;
};
std::vector<WiFiCred> savedNetworks;

// --- Web Server Setup ---
WiFiServer server(80);
String header;

// --- Button Debounce Variables ---
unsigned long lastButtonMillis = 0;
const long debounceTime = 250; 

// --- Lamp Constants & Variables ---
const int pwmPin = 23;       
const int bootButtonPin = 4; 
const int highPWM = 255;
const int medPWM = 150;
const int lowPWM = 50;
const int minPWM = 10;

int currentPWM = 0;
int pwmOveride = 0;      
int lightState = 0;      
int lastLightState = 4;  
int printNow = 0;
unsigned long currentTime = millis();
unsigned long previousTime = 0; 
const long timeoutTime = 2000;

// --- Helper Functions ---

unsigned char h2int(char c) {
  if (c >= '0' && c <= '9') return c - '0';
  if (c >= 'a' && c <= 'f') return c - 'a' + 10;
  if (c >= 'A' && c <= 'F') return c - 'A' + 10;
  return 0;
}

String urldecode(String str) {
  String decoded = "";
  for (int i = 0; i < str.length(); i++) {
    if (str[i] == '%') {
      if (i + 2 < str.length()) {
        decoded += (char)((h2int(str[i+1]) << 4) | h2int(str[i+2]));
        i += 2;
      }
    } else if (str[i] == '+') {
      decoded += ' ';
    } else {
      decoded += str[i];
    }
  }
  return decoded;
}

// Loads Wi-Fi credentials from NVS Memory
void loadNetworks() {
  savedNetworks.clear();
  preferences.begin("wifi_creds", true); 
  
  int count = preferences.getInt("count", 0);
  for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    String sKey = "s_" + String(i);
    String pKey = "p_" + String(i);
    String s = preferences.getString(sKey.c_str(), "");
    String p = preferences.getString(pKey.c_str(), "");
    if (s != "") savedNetworks.push_back({s, p});
  }
  
  preferences.end();
  Serial.print("Loaded "); Serial.print(savedNetworks.size()); Serial.println(" networks from NVS.");
}

// Saves Wi-Fi credentials to NVS Memory
void saveNetworks() {
  preferences.begin("wifi_creds", false); 
  preferences.clear(); 
  
  preferences.putInt("count", savedNetworks.size());
  for (int i = 0; i < savedNetworks.size(); i++) {
    String sKey = "s_" + String(i);
    String pKey = "p_" + String(i);
    preferences.putString(sKey.c_str(), savedNetworks[i].ssid);
    preferences.putString(pKey.c_str(), savedNetworks[i].pass);
  }
  
  preferences.end();
  Serial.println("Network list saved to NVS securely.");
}

void applyLightState() {
  if (pwmOveride == 0) {
    if (lightState == 1) currentPWM = minPWM;
    else if (lightState == 2) currentPWM = lowPWM;
    else if (lightState == 3) currentPWM = medPWM;
    else if (lightState == 4) currentPWM = highPWM;
    else currentPWM = 0; 
    analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM);
  }
}

void playWifiConnectSequence() {
  Serial.println("Playing Whimsical Animation...");
  for (int pulse = 0; pulse < 2; pulse++) {
    for (int i = 0; i <= 255; i += 15) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(10); }
    for (int i = 255; i >= 0; i -= 15) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(10); }
    analogWrite(pwmPin, 0); delay(100); 
  }
  delay(200); 
  for (int i = 0; i <= currentPWM; i += 5) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(15); }
  analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM); 
}

void setup() {
  Serial.begin(115200);
  while (!Serial); 

  pinMode(bootButtonPin, INPUT_PULLUP);
  pinMode(pwmPin, OUTPUT);
  analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM); 

  loadNetworks();

  Serial.println("System Ready.");

  // Decide how to start based on saved networks
  if (savedNetworks.size() == 0) {
    Serial.println("No saved networks. Starting AP Mode directly.");
    WiFi.mode(WIFI_AP_STA);
    WiFi.softAP("Blue Dot Lamp Setup", "password123"); 
    apActive = true;
  } else {
    Serial.println("Networks found. Starting in stealth STA Mode.");
    WiFi.mode(WIFI_STA);
    apActive = false;
  }
  
  server.begin(); 
}

void loop() {
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 1. Handle Physical Button Input 
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  int buttonState = digitalRead(bootButtonPin);

  if (buttonState == LOW && (millis() - lastButtonMillis > debounceTime)) {
    lastButtonMillis = millis(); 
    Serial.println("Button Pressed!");
    lightState++;
    if (lightState > 4) lightState = 0;
    if (lightState != 0) lastLightState = lightState;
    pwmOveride = 0; printNow = 1;
    applyLightState();
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 2. Handle Serial Input
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  if (Serial.available() > 0) {
    int input = Serial.parseInt();
    while (Serial.available() > 0) Serial.read(); 
    if (input >= 0 && input <= 255) {
      pwmOveride = 1; currentPWM = input;
      analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM); printNow = 1;
    }
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 3. Handle Wi-Fi Connection Cycling & AP Fallback
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  if (WiFi.status() != WL_CONNECTED) {
    wifiWasConnected = false;
    unsigned long currentMillis = millis();
    
    if (currentMillis - previousWifiMillis >= wifiInterval) {
      previousWifiMillis = currentMillis; 
      
      if (savedNetworks.size() > 0) {
        currentWifiIndex++;
        attemptsInCurrentCycle++; // Log that we are trying a network

        if (currentWifiIndex >= savedNetworks.size()) {
          currentWifiIndex = 0; // Wrap around to the beginning
        }
        
        // If we have tried every network on the list and failed, turn on the AP
        if (attemptsInCurrentCycle > savedNetworks.size() && !apActive) {
          Serial.println("Failed to connect to known networks. Starting AP Mode fallback.");
          WiFi.mode(WIFI_AP_STA);
          WiFi.softAP("Blue Dot Lamp Setup", "password123"); 
          apActive = true;
        }

        String trySsid = savedNetworks[currentWifiIndex].ssid;
        String tryPass = savedNetworks[currentWifiIndex].pass;

        Serial.print("Attempting to connect to: "); Serial.println(trySsid);      
        WiFi.disconnect(); 
        WiFi.begin(trySsid.c_str(), tryPass.c_str()); 
      }
    }
  } else {
    // If we just successfully connected!
    if (wifiWasConnected == false) {
      Serial.println("\nWiFi connected to router!");
      Serial.print("Local IP address: "); Serial.println(WiFi.localIP());
      playWifiConnectSequence(); 
      wifiWasConnected = true;
      attemptsInCurrentCycle = 0; // Reset our failure counter
      
      // If the AP was running, shut it down to save power and secure the device
      if (apActive) {
        Serial.println("Shutting down AP Setup Network.");
        WiFi.mode(WIFI_STA);
        apActive = false;
      }
    }
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 4. Handle Web Server Requests 
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  WiFiClient client = server.available();

  if (client) {
    currentTime = millis();
    previousTime = currentTime;
    String currentLine = ""; 
    
    while (client.connected() && currentTime - previousTime <= timeoutTime) {
      currentTime = millis();
      if (client.available()) {
        char c = client.read();
        header += c;
        if (c == '\n') {
          if (currentLine.length() == 0) {
            
            // --- API PATH: Add Wi-Fi Network ---
            if (header.indexOf("GET /add_wifi?") >= 0) {
              int sStart = header.indexOf("s=") + 2;
              int sEnd = header.indexOf("&", sStart);
              int pStart = header.indexOf("p=") + 2;
              int pEnd = header.indexOf(" HTTP", pStart);

              String newSsid = urldecode(header.substring(sStart, sEnd));
              String newPass = urldecode(header.substring(pStart, pEnd));

              savedNetworks.push_back({newSsid, newPass});
              saveNetworks();

              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:application/json\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");
              client.print("{\"status\":\"ok\"}");
              
              // Instantly force a connection attempt to the new network
              previousWifiMillis = millis() - wifiInterval; 
            }
            // --- API PATH: Delete Wi-Fi Network ---
            else if (header.indexOf("GET /delete_wifi?") >= 0) {
              int iStart = header.indexOf("index=") + 6;
              int iEnd = header.indexOf(" HTTP", iStart);
              String idxStr = header.substring(iStart, iEnd);
              int idx = idxStr.toInt();

              if (idx >= 0 && idx < savedNetworks.size()) {
                savedNetworks.erase(savedNetworks.begin() + idx);
                saveNetworks();
              }

              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:application/json\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");
              client.print("{\"status\":\"ok\"}");
            }
            // --- API PATH: Lamp Controls ---
            else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/") >= 0) {
              if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/on") >= 0) { lightState = lastLightState; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/off") >= 0) { lightState = 0; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/min") >= 0) { lightState = 1; lastLightState = 1; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/low") >= 0) { lightState = 2; lastLightState = 2; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/med") >= 0) { lightState = 3; lastLightState = 3; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/high") >= 0) { lightState = 4; lastLightState = 4; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/animate") >= 0) { playWifiConnectSequence(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/pwm?val=") >= 0) {
                int pwmStart = header.indexOf("val=") + 4;
                int pwmEnd = header.indexOf(" HTTP", pwmStart);
                String valStr = header.substring(pwmStart, pwmEnd);
                int newVal = valStr.toInt();
                if (newVal < 0) newVal = 0;
                if (newVal > 255) newVal = 255;
                if (newVal == 0) { lightState = 0; pwmOveride = 0; } 
                else { currentPWM = newVal; pwmOveride = 1; }
                analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM);
              }

              printNow = 1;
              String stateStr = "OFF";
              if (pwmOveride == 1) stateStr = "MANUAL OVERRIDE";
              else if (lightState == 1) stateStr = "MIN";
              else if (lightState == 2) stateStr = "LOW";
              else if (lightState == 3) stateStr = "MED";
              else if (lightState == 4) stateStr = "HIGH";
              else if (lightState == 0) stateStr = "OFF";

              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:application/json\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");
              client.print("{\"state\":\"" + stateStr + "\", \"pwm\":" + String(currentPWM) + "}");
            } 
            // --- PAGE PATH: Settings Page ---
            else if (header.indexOf("GET /settings ") >= 0) {
              
              String networkListHTML = "";
              for (int i = 0; i < savedNetworks.size(); i++) {
                networkListHTML += "<li style='background:#333; margin:8px auto; padding:10px 15px; border-radius:5px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; max-width:300px;'>";
                networkListHTML += "<span>" + savedNetworks[i].ssid + "</span>";
                networkListHTML += "<button class='btn btn-off' style='padding:6px 12px; font-size:14px; margin:0;' onclick='deleteNetwork(" + String(i) + ")'>X</button>";
                networkListHTML += "</li>";
              }
              if (savedNetworks.size() == 0) {
                networkListHTML = "<p style='color:#aaa;'>No networks saved yet.</p>";
              }

              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:text/html\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");
              String settingsTemplate = R"rawliteral(
              <!DOCTYPE html><html>
              <head><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1"><title>Lamp Settings</title>
              <style>
                body { font-family: Helvetica; text-align: center; background: #121212; color: #fff; padding-top: 20px;}
                input { padding: 10px; margin: 10px; width: 80%; max-width: 300px; border-radius: 5px; border: none;}
                .btn { background-color: #2196F3; border: none; color: white; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer;}
                .btn-off { background-color: #f44336; }
                .btn-back { background-color: #555; margin-top: 30px;}
                ul { list-style-type: none; padding: 0; }
              </style>
              <script>
                function addNetwork() {
                  let s = encodeURIComponent(document.getElementById("ssid").value);
                  let p = encodeURIComponent(document.getElementById("pass").value);
                  if(!s || !p) return alert("Fill out both fields!");
                  document.getElementById("status").innerText = "Saving & Connecting...";
                  fetch("/add_wifi?s=" + s + "&p=" + p)
                    .then(res => res.json())
                    .then(data => { location.reload(); }); 
                }
                function deleteNetwork(index) {
                  if(confirm("Are you sure you want to delete this network?")) {
                    fetch("/delete_wifi?index=" + index)
                      .then(res => res.json())
                      .then(data => { location.reload(); }); 
                  }
                }
              </script>
              </head>
              <body>
                <h2>Network Settings</h2>
                
                <ul id="network-list">
                  %NETWORK_LIST_PLACEHOLDER%
                </ul>
                <hr style="border: 0; height: 1px; background-color: #555; margin: 30px 10%; max-width: 350px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;">

                <p>Add a new Wi-Fi network:</p>
                <input type="text" id="ssid" placeholder="Network Name (SSID)"><br>
                <input type="password" id="pass" placeholder="Password"><br>
                <button class="btn" onclick="addNetwork()">Add Network</button>
                <p id="status" style="color:#4CAF50;"></p>
                <br>
                <a href="/"><button class="btn btn-back">Back to Lamp</button></a>
              </body></html>
              )rawliteral";
              
              settingsTemplate.replace("%NETWORK_LIST_PLACEHOLDER%", networkListHTML);
              client.print(settingsTemplate);
            }
            // --- PAGE PATH: Main Controller Page ---
            else if (header.indexOf("GET / ") >= 0) {
              String stateStr = "OFF";
              if (pwmOveride == 1) stateStr = "MANUAL OVERRIDE";
              else if (lightState == 1) stateStr = "MIN";
              else if (lightState == 2) stateStr = "LOW";
              else if (lightState == 3) stateStr = "MED";
              else if (lightState == 4) stateStr = "HIGH";

              String powerBtn = "";
              if (lightState == 0 && currentPWM == 0) {
                 powerBtn = "<button class=\"btn btn-blue\" onclick=\"sendCommand('/lamp/on')\">Turn ON (Restore)</button>";
              } else {
                 powerBtn = "<button class=\"btn btn-off\" onclick=\"sendCommand('/lamp/off')\">Turn OFF</button>";
              }

              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:text/html\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");

              String htmlTemplate = R"rawliteral(
              <!DOCTYPE html><html>
              <head><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1"><title>Blue Dot Lamp</title>
              <style>
                :root { --bg-color: #121212; --text-color: #ffffff; }
                .light-mode { --bg-color: #f4f4f4; --text-color: #121212; }
                body { font-family: Helvetica; text-align: center; background-color: var(--bg-color); color: var(--text-color); transition: background-color 0.4s, color 0.4s; width: 100%; padding-top: 20px;}
                .btn { background-color: #4CAF50; border: none; color: white; padding: 16px 30px; font-size: 20px; margin: 4px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 8px;}
                .btn-off { background-color: #f44336; } .btn-blue { background-color: #2196F3; } .btn-purple { background-color: #9C27B0; }
                .theme-btn { background-color: #607D8B; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 20px; margin-top: 20px;}
                .nav-btn { background-color: #333; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 20px; margin-top: 20px; color: white; text-decoration: none;}
                hr { border: 0; height: 1px; background-color: #555; margin: 30px 10%; }
                .slider { -webkit-appearance: none; width: 80%; height: 15px; border-radius: 5px; background: #d3d3d3; outline: none; margin-top: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
                .slider::-webkit-slider-thumb { -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 50%; background: #4CAF50; cursor: pointer; }
              </style>
              <script>
                function handleResponse(data) {
                  document.getElementById("state-display").innerText = data.state;
                  document.getElementById("pwmSlider").value = data.pwm;
                  document.getElementById("sliderValue").innerText = data.pwm;
                  let pBtn = document.getElementById("power-container");
                  if(data.state === "OFF") pBtn.innerHTML = '<button class="btn btn-blue" onclick="sendCommand(\'/lamp/on\')">Turn ON (Restore)</button>';
                  else pBtn.innerHTML = '<button class="btn btn-off" onclick="sendCommand(\'/lamp/off\')">Turn OFF</button>';
                }
                function sendCommand(cmd) { fetch(cmd).then(res => res.json()).then(data => handleResponse(data)); }
                function updateSliderUI(val) { document.getElementById("sliderValue").innerText = val; }
                function sendPWM(val) { fetch('/lamp/pwm?val=' + val).then(res => res.json()).then(data => handleResponse(data)); }
                function toggleTheme() {
                  document.body.classList.toggle("light-mode");
                  let tb = document.getElementById("theme-btn");
                  if (document.body.classList.contains("light-mode")) tb.innerText = "Switch to Dark Mode";
                  else tb.innerText = "Switch to Light Mode";
                }
              </script>
              </head>
              <body>
              <h1>Blue Dot Lamp</h1>
              <h3>Current State: <strong id="state-display">%STATE_PLACEHOLDER%</strong></h3>
              <div id="power-container">%POWER_PLACEHOLDER%</div><br><hr>
              <div>
                <input type="range" min="0" max="255" value="%PWM_PLACEHOLDER%" class="slider" id="pwmSlider" oninput="updateSliderUI(this.value)" onchange="sendPWM(this.value)">
                <p>Custom Brightness: <strong id="sliderValue">%PWM_PLACEHOLDER%</strong></p>
              </div><hr>
              <div>
                <button class="btn" onclick="sendCommand('/lamp/min')">MIN</button>
                <button class="btn" onclick="sendCommand('/lamp/low')">LOW</button>
                <button class="btn" onclick="sendCommand('/lamp/med')">MED</button>
                <button class="btn" onclick="sendCommand('/lamp/high')">HIGH</button>
              </div><br>
              <div><button class="btn btn-purple" onclick="sendCommand('/lamp/animate')">Play Animation</button></div>
              <hr>
              <button id="theme-btn" class="btn theme-btn" onclick="toggleTheme()">Switch to Light Mode</button><br><br>
              <a href="/settings" class="nav-btn">Network Settings</a>
              </body></html>
              )rawliteral";
              
              htmlTemplate.replace("%STATE_PLACEHOLDER%", stateStr);
              htmlTemplate.replace("%POWER_PLACEHOLDER%", powerBtn);
              htmlTemplate.replace("%PWM_PLACEHOLDER%", String(currentPWM));
              client.print(htmlTemplate);
            }
            break;
          } else {
            currentLine = "";
          }
        } else if (c != '\r') {
          currentLine += c;
        }
      }
    }
    header = "";
    client.stop();
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 5. Report to Serial Monitor
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  if (printNow == 1) {
    Serial.print("PWM Set: "); Serial.print(currentPWM);
    Serial.print(" | lightState: "); Serial.print(lightState);
    if (pwmOveride == 1) Serial.print(" [SERIAL OVERRIDE]");
    Serial.println("");
    printNow = 0;
  }
}

This ensures your home network stays totally clean while keeping the crucial safety net of the setup portal active only when strictly necessary.

Are you ready to move on to setting up OTA (Over-The-Air) updates so you can finally put the lamp on the shelf and code it wirelessly from your desk?

Can you make it so that after playing the successful connect animation it waits a two seconds and them displays the last octet of the wifi IP address using Morse code with a second between each digit?

That is a brilliantly practical feature! Blinking out the IP address is a classic hardware engineering trick to figure out where a "headless" (screenless) device lives on the network without having to log into your router to check.

To make this work, I've added a few small helper functions that grab your IP, isolate the 4th block (the "octet"), and translate those digits into dots and dashes using standard Morse code timing.

Here is your updated code. Just replace your existing sketch with this:
C++

#include <WiFi.h>
#include <Preferences.h>
#include <vector>

// --- NVS Storage ---
Preferences preferences;

// --- Wi-Fi Reconnection Timer Variables ---
unsigned long previousWifiMillis = 0; 
const long wifiInterval = 12000; 
bool wifiWasConnected = false;   
int currentWifiIndex = -1;
int attemptsInCurrentCycle = 0;  
bool apActive = false;           

// --- Saved Networks Structure ---
struct WiFiCred {
  String ssid;
  String pass;
};
std::vector<WiFiCred> savedNetworks;

// --- Web Server Setup ---
WiFiServer server(80);
String header;

// --- Button Debounce Variables ---
unsigned long lastButtonMillis = 0;
const long debounceTime = 250; 

// --- Lamp Constants & Variables ---
const int pwmPin = 23;       
const int bootButtonPin = 4; 
const int highPWM = 255;
const int medPWM = 150;
const int lowPWM = 50;
const int minPWM = 10;

int currentPWM = 0;
int pwmOveride = 0;      
int lightState = 0;      
int lastLightState = 4;  
int printNow = 0;
unsigned long currentTime = millis();
unsigned long previousTime = 0; 
const long timeoutTime = 2000;

// --- Helper Functions ---

unsigned char h2int(char c) {
  if (c >= '0' && c <= '9') return c - '0';
  if (c >= 'a' && c <= 'f') return c - 'a' + 10;
  if (c >= 'A' && c <= 'F') return c - 'A' + 10;
  return 0;
}

String urldecode(String str) {
  String decoded = "";
  for (int i = 0; i < str.length(); i++) {
    if (str[i] == '%') {
      if (i + 2 < str.length()) {
        decoded += (char)((h2int(str[i+1]) << 4) | h2int(str[i+2]));
        i += 2;
      }
    } else if (str[i] == '+') {
      decoded += ' ';
    } else {
      decoded += str[i];
    }
  }
  return decoded;
}

// Loads Wi-Fi credentials from NVS Memory
void loadNetworks() {
  savedNetworks.clear();
  preferences.begin("wifi_creds", true); 
  
  int count = preferences.getInt("count", 0);
  for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    String sKey = "s_" + String(i);
    String pKey = "p_" + String(i);
    String s = preferences.getString(sKey.c_str(), "");
    String p = preferences.getString(pKey.c_str(), "");
    if (s != "") savedNetworks.push_back({s, p});
  }
  
  preferences.end();
  Serial.print("Loaded "); Serial.print(savedNetworks.size()); Serial.println(" networks from NVS.");
}

// Saves Wi-Fi credentials to NVS Memory
void saveNetworks() {
  preferences.begin("wifi_creds", false); 
  preferences.clear(); 
  
  preferences.putInt("count", savedNetworks.size());
  for (int i = 0; i < savedNetworks.size(); i++) {
    String sKey = "s_" + String(i);
    String pKey = "p_" + String(i);
    preferences.putString(sKey.c_str(), savedNetworks[i].ssid);
    preferences.putString(pKey.c_str(), savedNetworks[i].pass);
  }
  
  preferences.end();
  Serial.println("Network list saved to NVS securely.");
}

void applyLightState() {
  if (pwmOveride == 0) {
    if (lightState == 1) currentPWM = minPWM;
    else if (lightState == 2) currentPWM = lowPWM;
    else if (lightState == 3) currentPWM = medPWM;
    else if (lightState == 4) currentPWM = highPWM;
    else currentPWM = 0; 
    analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM);
  }
}

void playWifiConnectSequence() {
  Serial.println("Playing Whimsical Animation...");
  for (int pulse = 0; pulse < 2; pulse++) {
    for (int i = 0; i <= 255; i += 15) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(10); }
    for (int i = 255; i >= 0; i -= 15) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(10); }
    analogWrite(pwmPin, 0); delay(100); 
  }
  delay(200); 
  for (int i = 0; i <= currentPWM; i += 5) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(15); }
  analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM); 
}

// --- Morse Code Helpers ---
String digitToMorse(char digit) {
  switch (digit) {
    case '0': return "-----";
    case '1': return ".----";
    case '2': return "..---";
    case '3': return "...--";
    case '4': return "....-";
    case '5': return ".....";
    case '6': return "-....";
    case '7': return "--...";
    case '8': return "---..";
    case '9': return "----.";
    default: return "";
  }
}

void blinkMorse(String morseStr) {
  int dotDuration = 200; // 200ms per dot
  
  // Start from off
  analogWrite(pwmPin, 0);
  delay(dotDuration);

  for (int i = 0; i < morseStr.length(); i++) {
    if (morseStr[i] == '.') {
      analogWrite(pwmPin, medPWM); // Use medium brightness for Morse
      delay(dotDuration);
    } else if (morseStr[i] == '-') {
      analogWrite(pwmPin, medPWM);
      delay(dotDuration * 3); // Dash is 3x dot length
    }
    analogWrite(pwmPin, 0);
    delay(dotDuration); // Gap between parts of the same letter
  }
}

void playIPMorse() {
  IPAddress ip = WiFi.localIP();
  String lastOctet = String(ip[3]);
  
  Serial.print("Blinking Morse for IP Octet: ");
  Serial.println(lastOctet);

  delay(2000); // Wait 2 seconds before starting

  for (int i = 0; i < lastOctet.length(); i++) {
    String morse = digitToMorse(lastOctet[i]);
    blinkMorse(morse);
    
    // Gap between distinct digits
    if (i < lastOctet.length() - 1) {
      delay(1000); 
    }
  }
  
  // Smoothly slide back up to whatever state the lamp was supposed to be in
  for (int i = 0; i <= currentPWM; i += 5) { 
    analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(15); 
  }
  analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM);
}

void setup() {
  Serial.begin(115200);
  while (!Serial); 

  pinMode(bootButtonPin, INPUT_PULLUP);
  pinMode(pwmPin, OUTPUT);
  analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM); 

  loadNetworks();

  Serial.println("System Ready.");

  if (savedNetworks.size() == 0) {
    Serial.println("No saved networks. Starting AP Mode directly.");
    WiFi.mode(WIFI_AP_STA);
    WiFi.softAP("Blue Dot Lamp Setup", "password123"); 
    apActive = true;
  } else {
    Serial.println("Networks found. Starting in stealth STA Mode.");
    WiFi.mode(WIFI_STA);
    apActive = false;
  }
  
  server.begin(); 
}

void loop() {
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 1. Handle Physical Button Input 
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  int buttonState = digitalRead(bootButtonPin);

  if (buttonState == LOW && (millis() - lastButtonMillis > debounceTime)) {
    lastButtonMillis = millis(); 
    Serial.println("Button Pressed!");
    lightState++;
    if (lightState > 4) lightState = 0;
    if (lightState != 0) lastLightState = lightState;
    pwmOveride = 0; printNow = 1;
    applyLightState();
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 2. Handle Serial Input
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  if (Serial.available() > 0) {
    int input = Serial.parseInt();
    while (Serial.available() > 0) Serial.read(); 
    if (input >= 0 && input <= 255) {
      pwmOveride = 1; currentPWM = input;
      analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM); printNow = 1;
    }
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 3. Handle Wi-Fi Connection Cycling & AP Fallback
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  if (WiFi.status() != WL_CONNECTED) {
    wifiWasConnected = false;
    unsigned long currentMillis = millis();
    
    if (currentMillis - previousWifiMillis >= wifiInterval) {
      previousWifiMillis = currentMillis; 
      
      if (savedNetworks.size() > 0) {
        currentWifiIndex++;
        attemptsInCurrentCycle++; 

        if (currentWifiIndex >= savedNetworks.size()) {
          currentWifiIndex = 0; 
        }
        
        if (attemptsInCurrentCycle > savedNetworks.size() && !apActive) {
          Serial.println("Failed to connect to known networks. Starting AP Mode fallback.");
          WiFi.mode(WIFI_AP_STA);
          WiFi.softAP("Blue Dot Lamp Setup", "password123"); 
          apActive = true;
        }

        String trySsid = savedNetworks[currentWifiIndex].ssid;
        String tryPass = savedNetworks[currentWifiIndex].pass;

        Serial.print("Attempting to connect to: "); Serial.println(trySsid);      
        WiFi.disconnect(); 
        WiFi.begin(trySsid.c_str(), tryPass.c_str()); 
      }
    }
  } else {
    // If we just successfully connected!
    if (wifiWasConnected == false) {
      Serial.println("\nWiFi connected to router!");
      Serial.print("Local IP address: "); Serial.println(WiFi.localIP());
      playWifiConnectSequence(); 
      playIPMorse(); // Trigger the Morse Code sequence
      wifiWasConnected = true;
      attemptsInCurrentCycle = 0; 
      
      if (apActive) {
        Serial.println("Shutting down AP Setup Network.");
        WiFi.mode(WIFI_STA);
        apActive = false;
      }
    }
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 4. Handle Web Server Requests 
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  WiFiClient client = server.available();

  if (client) {
    currentTime = millis();
    previousTime = currentTime;
    String currentLine = ""; 
    
    while (client.connected() && currentTime - previousTime <= timeoutTime) {
      currentTime = millis();
      if (client.available()) {
        char c = client.read();
        header += c;
        if (c == '\n') {
          if (currentLine.length() == 0) {
            
            // --- API PATH: Add Wi-Fi Network ---
            if (header.indexOf("GET /add_wifi?") >= 0) {
              int sStart = header.indexOf("s=") + 2;
              int sEnd = header.indexOf("&", sStart);
              int pStart = header.indexOf("p=") + 2;
              int pEnd = header.indexOf(" HTTP", pStart);

              String newSsid = urldecode(header.substring(sStart, sEnd));
              String newPass = urldecode(header.substring(pStart, pEnd));

              savedNetworks.push_back({newSsid, newPass});
              saveNetworks();

              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:application/json\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");
              client.print("{\"status\":\"ok\"}");
              
              previousWifiMillis = millis() - wifiInterval; 
            }
            // --- API PATH: Delete Wi-Fi Network ---
            else if (header.indexOf("GET /delete_wifi?") >= 0) {
              int iStart = header.indexOf("index=") + 6;
              int iEnd = header.indexOf(" HTTP", iStart);
              String idxStr = header.substring(iStart, iEnd);
              int idx = idxStr.toInt();

              if (idx >= 0 && idx < savedNetworks.size()) {
                savedNetworks.erase(savedNetworks.begin() + idx);
                saveNetworks();
              }

              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:application/json\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");
              client.print("{\"status\":\"ok\"}");
            }
            // --- API PATH: Lamp Controls ---
            else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/") >= 0) {
              if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/on") >= 0) { lightState = lastLightState; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/off") >= 0) { lightState = 0; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/min") >= 0) { lightState = 1; lastLightState = 1; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/low") >= 0) { lightState = 2; lastLightState = 2; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/med") >= 0) { lightState = 3; lastLightState = 3; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/high") >= 0) { lightState = 4; lastLightState = 4; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/animate") >= 0) { playWifiConnectSequence(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/pwm?val=") >= 0) {
                int pwmStart = header.indexOf("val=") + 4;
                int pwmEnd = header.indexOf(" HTTP", pwmStart);
                String valStr = header.substring(pwmStart, pwmEnd);
                int newVal = valStr.toInt();
                if (newVal < 0) newVal = 0;
                if (newVal > 255) newVal = 255;
                if (newVal == 0) { lightState = 0; pwmOveride = 0; } 
                else { currentPWM = newVal; pwmOveride = 1; }
                analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM);
              }

              printNow = 1;
              String stateStr = "OFF";
              if (pwmOveride == 1) stateStr = "MANUAL OVERRIDE";
              else if (lightState == 1) stateStr = "MIN";
              else if (lightState == 2) stateStr = "LOW";
              else if (lightState == 3) stateStr = "MED";
              else if (lightState == 4) stateStr = "HIGH";
              else if (lightState == 0) stateStr = "OFF";

              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:application/json\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");
              client.print("{\"state\":\"" + stateStr + "\", \"pwm\":" + String(currentPWM) + "}");
            } 
            // --- PAGE PATH: Settings Page ---
            else if (header.indexOf("GET /settings ") >= 0) {
              
              String networkListHTML = "";
              for (int i = 0; i < savedNetworks.size(); i++) {
                networkListHTML += "<li style='background:#333; margin:8px auto; padding:10px 15px; border-radius:5px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; max-width:300px;'>";
                networkListHTML += "<span>" + savedNetworks[i].ssid + "</span>";
                networkListHTML += "<button class='btn btn-off' style='padding:6px 12px; font-size:14px; margin:0;' onclick='deleteNetwork(" + String(i) + ")'>X</button>";
                networkListHTML += "</li>";
              }
              if (savedNetworks.size() == 0) {
                networkListHTML = "<p style='color:#aaa;'>No networks saved yet.</p>";
              }

              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:text/html\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");
              String settingsTemplate = R"rawliteral(
              <!DOCTYPE html><html>
              <head><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1"><title>Lamp Settings</title>
              <style>
                body { font-family: Helvetica; text-align: center; background: #121212; color: #fff; padding-top: 20px;}
                input { padding: 10px; margin: 10px; width: 80%; max-width: 300px; border-radius: 5px; border: none;}
                .btn { background-color: #2196F3; border: none; color: white; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer;}
                .btn-off { background-color: #f44336; }
                .btn-back { background-color: #555; margin-top: 30px;}
                ul { list-style-type: none; padding: 0; }
              </style>
              <script>
                function addNetwork() {
                  let s = encodeURIComponent(document.getElementById("ssid").value);
                  let p = encodeURIComponent(document.getElementById("pass").value);
                  if(!s || !p) return alert("Fill out both fields!");
                  document.getElementById("status").innerText = "Saving & Connecting...";
                  fetch("/add_wifi?s=" + s + "&p=" + p)
                    .then(res => res.json())
                    .then(data => { location.reload(); }); 
                }
                function deleteNetwork(index) {
                  if(confirm("Are you sure you want to delete this network?")) {
                    fetch("/delete_wifi?index=" + index)
                      .then(res => res.json())
                      .then(data => { location.reload(); }); 
                  }
                }
              </script>
              </head>
              <body>
                <h2>Network Settings</h2>
                
                <ul id="network-list">
                  %NETWORK_LIST_PLACEHOLDER%
                </ul>
                <hr style="border: 0; height: 1px; background-color: #555; margin: 30px 10%; max-width: 350px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;">

                <p>Add a new Wi-Fi network:</p>
                <input type="text" id="ssid" placeholder="Network Name (SSID)"><br>
                <input type="password" id="pass" placeholder="Password"><br>
                <button class="btn" onclick="addNetwork()">Add Network</button>
                <p id="status" style="color:#4CAF50;"></p>
                <br>
                <a href="/"><button class="btn btn-back">Back to Lamp</button></a>
              </body></html>
              )rawliteral";
              
              settingsTemplate.replace("%NETWORK_LIST_PLACEHOLDER%", networkListHTML);
              client.print(settingsTemplate);
            }
            // --- PAGE PATH: Main Controller Page ---
            else if (header.indexOf("GET / ") >= 0) {
              String stateStr = "OFF";
              if (pwmOveride == 1) stateStr = "MANUAL OVERRIDE";
              else if (lightState == 1) stateStr = "MIN";
              else if (lightState == 2) stateStr = "LOW";
              else if (lightState == 3) stateStr = "MED";
              else if (lightState == 4) stateStr = "HIGH";

              String powerBtn = "";
              if (lightState == 0 && currentPWM == 0) {
                 powerBtn = "<button class=\"btn btn-blue\" onclick=\"sendCommand('/lamp/on')\">Turn ON (Restore)</button>";
              } else {
                 powerBtn = "<button class=\"btn btn-off\" onclick=\"sendCommand('/lamp/off')\">Turn OFF</button>";
              }

              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:text/html\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");

              String htmlTemplate = R"rawliteral(
              <!DOCTYPE html><html>
              <head><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1"><title>Blue Dot Lamp</title>
              <style>
                :root { --bg-color: #121212; --text-color: #ffffff; }
                .light-mode { --bg-color: #f4f4f4; --text-color: #121212; }
                body { font-family: Helvetica; text-align: center; background-color: var(--bg-color); color: var(--text-color); transition: background-color 0.4s, color 0.4s; width: 100%; padding-top: 20px;}
                .btn { background-color: #4CAF50; border: none; color: white; padding: 16px 30px; font-size: 20px; margin: 4px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 8px;}
                .btn-off { background-color: #f44336; } .btn-blue { background-color: #2196F3; } .btn-purple { background-color: #9C27B0; }
                .theme-btn { background-color: #607D8B; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 20px; margin-top: 20px;}
                .nav-btn { background-color: #333; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 20px; margin-top: 20px; color: white; text-decoration: none;}
                hr { border: 0; height: 1px; background-color: #555; margin: 30px 10%; }
                .slider { -webkit-appearance: none; width: 80%; height: 15px; border-radius: 5px; background: #d3d3d3; outline: none; margin-top: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
                .slider::-webkit-slider-thumb { -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 50%; background: #4CAF50; cursor: pointer; }
              </style>
              <script>
                function handleResponse(data) {
                  document.getElementById("state-display").innerText = data.state;
                  document.getElementById("pwmSlider").value = data.pwm;
                  document.getElementById("sliderValue").innerText = data.pwm;
                  let pBtn = document.getElementById("power-container");
                  if(data.state === "OFF") pBtn.innerHTML = '<button class="btn btn-blue" onclick="sendCommand(\'/lamp/on\')">Turn ON (Restore)</button>';
                  else pBtn.innerHTML = '<button class="btn btn-off" onclick="sendCommand(\'/lamp/off\')">Turn OFF</button>';
                }
                function sendCommand(cmd) { fetch(cmd).then(res => res.json()).then(data => handleResponse(data)); }
                function updateSliderUI(val) { document.getElementById("sliderValue").innerText = val; }
                function sendPWM(val) { fetch('/lamp/pwm?val=' + val).then(res => res.json()).then(data => handleResponse(data)); }
                function toggleTheme() {
                  document.body.classList.toggle("light-mode");
                  let tb = document.getElementById("theme-btn");
                  if (document.body.classList.contains("light-mode")) tb.innerText = "Switch to Dark Mode";
                  else tb.innerText = "Switch to Light Mode";
                }
              </script>
              </head>
              <body>
              <h1>Blue Dot Lamp</h1>
              <h3>Current State: <strong id="state-display">%STATE_PLACEHOLDER%</strong></h3>
              <div id="power-container">%POWER_PLACEHOLDER%</div><br><hr>
              <div>
                <input type="range" min="0" max="255" value="%PWM_PLACEHOLDER%" class="slider" id="pwmSlider" oninput="updateSliderUI(this.value)" onchange="sendPWM(this.value)">
                <p>Custom Brightness: <strong id="sliderValue">%PWM_PLACEHOLDER%</strong></p>
              </div><hr>
              <div>
                <button class="btn" onclick="sendCommand('/lamp/min')">MIN</button>
                <button class="btn" onclick="sendCommand('/lamp/low')">LOW</button>
                <button class="btn" onclick="sendCommand('/lamp/med')">MED</button>
                <button class="btn" onclick="sendCommand('/lamp/high')">HIGH</button>
              </div><br>
              <div><button class="btn btn-purple" onclick="sendCommand('/lamp/animate')">Play Animation</button></div>
              <hr>
              <button id="theme-btn" class="btn theme-btn" onclick="toggleTheme()">Switch to Light Mode</button><br><br>
              <a href="/settings" class="nav-btn">Network Settings</a>
              </body></html>
              )rawliteral";
              
              htmlTemplate.replace("%STATE_PLACEHOLDER%", stateStr);
              htmlTemplate.replace("%POWER_PLACEHOLDER%", powerBtn);
              htmlTemplate.replace("%PWM_PLACEHOLDER%", String(currentPWM));
              client.print(htmlTemplate);
            }
            break;
          } else {
            currentLine = "";
          }
        } else if (c != '\r') {
          currentLine += c;
        }
      }
    }
    header = "";
    client.stop();
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 5. Report to Serial Monitor
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  if (printNow == 1) {
    Serial.print("PWM Set: "); Serial.print(currentPWM);
    Serial.print(" | lightState: "); Serial.print(lightState);
    if (pwmOveride == 1) Serial.print(" [SERIAL OVERRIDE]");
    Serial.println("");
    printNow = 0;
  }
}

What's Changed

    digitToMorse(): A helper to turn a char (like '4') into a string of dots and dashes.

    blinkMorse(): A loop that plays the string. It pushes out medPWM so the blinks are comfortably bright, pausing 200ms for dots and 600ms for dashes.

    playIPMorse(): This gets the IP address via WiFi.localIP(), extracts the 4th octet (ip[3]), and iterates through it, adding your 2-second setup delay and 1-second spacer between the digits.

Now, if your lamp connects and gets 192.168.1.104, it will do the double heartbeat pulse, wait 2 seconds, and then blink out .---- (1), ----- (0), and ....- (4).

Would you like me to guide you through adding Over-The-Air (OTA) updates now so you can flash the ESP32 wirelessly?

How would you do an OTA update?

You have built a seriously robust IoT framework! Adding Over-The-Air (OTA) updates is the ultimate power move. It means you can completely seal your ESP32 inside a lamp base, put it on a shelf, and still push new code to it from your laptop via Wi-Fi.

To do this, we use the built-in ArduinoOTA library. It listens in the background for a specific signal from your Arduino IDE, accepts the new compiled binary file, writes it to a secondary partition in the flash memory, and reboots the ESP32 to run the new code.

Here is your final, OTA-enabled code. Copy and paste this over your sketch:
C++

#include <WiFi.h>
#include <Preferences.h>
#include <vector>
#include <ESPmDNS.h>
#include <WiFiUdp.h>
#include <ArduinoOTA.h>

// --- NVS Storage ---
Preferences preferences;

// --- Wi-Fi Reconnection Timer Variables ---
unsigned long previousWifiMillis = 0; 
const long wifiInterval = 12000; 
bool wifiWasConnected = false;   
int currentWifiIndex = -1;
int attemptsInCurrentCycle = 0;  
bool apActive = false;           

// --- Saved Networks Structure ---
struct WiFiCred {
  String ssid;
  String pass;
};
std::vector<WiFiCred> savedNetworks;

// --- Web Server Setup ---
WiFiServer server(80);
String header;

// --- Button Debounce Variables ---
unsigned long lastButtonMillis = 0;
const long debounceTime = 250; 

// --- Lamp Constants & Variables ---
const int pwmPin = 23;       
const int bootButtonPin = 4; 
const int highPWM = 255;
const int medPWM = 150;
const int lowPWM = 50;
const int minPWM = 10;

int currentPWM = 0;
int pwmOveride = 0;      
int lightState = 0;      
int lastLightState = 4;  
int printNow = 0;
unsigned long currentTime = millis();
unsigned long previousTime = 0; 
const long timeoutTime = 2000;

// --- Helper Functions ---

unsigned char h2int(char c) {
  if (c >= '0' && c <= '9') return c - '0';
  if (c >= 'a' && c <= 'f') return c - 'a' + 10;
  if (c >= 'A' && c <= 'F') return c - 'A' + 10;
  return 0;
}

String urldecode(String str) {
  String decoded = "";
  for (int i = 0; i < str.length(); i++) {
    if (str[i] == '%') {
      if (i + 2 < str.length()) {
        decoded += (char)((h2int(str[i+1]) << 4) | h2int(str[i+2]));
        i += 2;
      }
    } else if (str[i] == '+') {
      decoded += ' ';
    } else {
      decoded += str[i];
    }
  }
  return decoded;
}

// Loads Wi-Fi credentials from NVS Memory
void loadNetworks() {
  savedNetworks.clear();
  preferences.begin("wifi_creds", true); 
  
  int count = preferences.getInt("count", 0);
  for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    String sKey = "s_" + String(i);
    String pKey = "p_" + String(i);
    String s = preferences.getString(sKey.c_str(), "");
    String p = preferences.getString(pKey.c_str(), "");
    if (s != "") savedNetworks.push_back({s, p});
  }
  
  preferences.end();
  Serial.print("Loaded "); Serial.print(savedNetworks.size()); Serial.println(" networks from NVS.");
}

// Saves Wi-Fi credentials to NVS Memory
void saveNetworks() {
  preferences.begin("wifi_creds", false); 
  preferences.clear(); 
  
  preferences.putInt("count", savedNetworks.size());
  for (int i = 0; i < savedNetworks.size(); i++) {
    String sKey = "s_" + String(i);
    String pKey = "p_" + String(i);
    preferences.putString(sKey.c_str(), savedNetworks[i].ssid);
    preferences.putString(pKey.c_str(), savedNetworks[i].pass);
  }
  
  preferences.end();
  Serial.println("Network list saved to NVS securely.");
}

void applyLightState() {
  if (pwmOveride == 0) {
    if (lightState == 1) currentPWM = minPWM;
    else if (lightState == 2) currentPWM = lowPWM;
    else if (lightState == 3) currentPWM = medPWM;
    else if (lightState == 4) currentPWM = highPWM;
    else currentPWM = 0; 
    analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM);
  }
}

void playWifiConnectSequence() {
  Serial.println("Playing Whimsical Animation...");
  for (int pulse = 0; pulse < 2; pulse++) {
    for (int i = 0; i <= 255; i += 15) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(10); }
    for (int i = 255; i >= 0; i -= 15) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(10); }
    analogWrite(pwmPin, 0); delay(100); 
  }
  delay(200); 
  for (int i = 0; i <= currentPWM; i += 5) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(15); }
  analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM); 
}

// --- Morse Code Helpers ---
String digitToMorse(char digit) {
  switch (digit) {
    case '0': return "-----";
    case '1': return ".----";
    case '2': return "..---";
    case '3': return "...--";
    case '4': return "....-";
    case '5': return ".....";
    case '6': return "-....";
    case '7': return "--...";
    case '8': return "---..";
    case '9': return "----.";
    default: return "";
  }
}

void blinkMorse(String morseStr) {
  int dotDuration = 200; 
  
  analogWrite(pwmPin, 0);
  delay(dotDuration);

  for (int i = 0; i < morseStr.length(); i++) {
    if (morseStr[i] == '.') {
      analogWrite(pwmPin, medPWM); 
      delay(dotDuration);
    } else if (morseStr[i] == '-') {
      analogWrite(pwmPin, medPWM);
      delay(dotDuration * 3); 
    }
    analogWrite(pwmPin, 0);
    delay(dotDuration); 
  }
}

void playIPMorse() {
  IPAddress ip = WiFi.localIP();
  String lastOctet = String(ip[3]);
  
  Serial.print("Blinking Morse for IP Octet: ");
  Serial.println(lastOctet);

  delay(2000); 

  for (int i = 0; i < lastOctet.length(); i++) {
    String morse = digitToMorse(lastOctet[i]);
    blinkMorse(morse);
    
    if (i < lastOctet.length() - 1) {
      delay(1000); 
    }
  }
  
  for (int i = 0; i <= currentPWM; i += 5) { 
    analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(15); 
  }
  analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM);
}

// --- OTA Setup Function ---
void setupOTA() {
  ArduinoOTA.setHostname("bluedotlamp");
  // ArduinoOTA.setPassword("admin"); // Optional: Uncomment to require a password for flashing

  ArduinoOTA.onStart([]() {
    String type;
    if (ArduinoOTA.getCommand() == U_FLASH) {
      type = "sketch";
    } else { 
      type = "filesystem";
    }
    Serial.println("Start updating " + type);
  });
  
  ArduinoOTA.onEnd([]() {
    Serial.println("\nEnd");
  });
  
  ArduinoOTA.onProgress([](unsigned int progress, unsigned int total) {
    Serial.printf("Progress: %u%%\r", (progress / (total / 100)));
  });
  
  ArduinoOTA.onError([](ota_error_t error) {
    Serial.printf("Error[%u]: ", error);
    if (error == OTA_AUTH_ERROR) { Serial.println("Auth Failed"); } 
    else if (error == OTA_BEGIN_ERROR) { Serial.println("Begin Failed"); } 
    else if (error == OTA_CONNECT_ERROR) { Serial.println("Connect Failed"); } 
    else if (error == OTA_RECEIVE_ERROR) { Serial.println("Receive Failed"); } 
    else if (error == OTA_END_ERROR) { Serial.println("End Failed"); }
  });

  ArduinoOTA.begin();
  Serial.println("OTA Ready");
}

void setup() {
  Serial.begin(115200);
  while (!Serial); 

  pinMode(bootButtonPin, INPUT_PULLUP);
  pinMode(pwmPin, OUTPUT);
  analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM); 

  loadNetworks();

  Serial.println("System Ready.");

  if (savedNetworks.size() == 0) {
    Serial.println("No saved networks. Starting AP Mode directly.");
    WiFi.mode(WIFI_AP_STA);
    WiFi.softAP("Blue Dot Lamp Setup", "password123"); 
    apActive = true;
  } else {
    Serial.println("Networks found. Starting in stealth STA Mode.");
    WiFi.mode(WIFI_STA);
    apActive = false;
  }
  
  setupOTA(); // Initialize OTA configuration
  server.begin(); 
}

void loop() {
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 0. Handle OTA Updates (MUST be called constantly)
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  ArduinoOTA.handle();

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 1. Handle Physical Button Input 
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  int buttonState = digitalRead(bootButtonPin);

  if (buttonState == LOW && (millis() - lastButtonMillis > debounceTime)) {
    lastButtonMillis = millis(); 
    Serial.println("Button Pressed!");
    lightState++;
    if (lightState > 4) lightState = 0;
    if (lightState != 0) lastLightState = lightState;
    pwmOveride = 0; printNow = 1;
    applyLightState();
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 2. Handle Serial Input
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  if (Serial.available() > 0) {
    int input = Serial.parseInt();
    while (Serial.available() > 0) Serial.read(); 
    if (input >= 0 && input <= 255) {
      pwmOveride = 1; currentPWM = input;
      analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM); printNow = 1;
    }
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 3. Handle Wi-Fi Connection Cycling & AP Fallback
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  if (WiFi.status() != WL_CONNECTED) {
    wifiWasConnected = false;
    unsigned long currentMillis = millis();
    
    if (currentMillis - previousWifiMillis >= wifiInterval) {
      previousWifiMillis = currentMillis; 
      
      if (savedNetworks.size() > 0) {
        currentWifiIndex++;
        attemptsInCurrentCycle++; 

        if (currentWifiIndex >= savedNetworks.size()) {
          currentWifiIndex = 0; 
        }
        
        if (attemptsInCurrentCycle > savedNetworks.size() && !apActive) {
          Serial.println("Failed to connect to known networks. Starting AP Mode fallback.");
          WiFi.mode(WIFI_AP_STA);
          WiFi.softAP("Blue Dot Lamp Setup", "password123"); 
          apActive = true;
        }

        String trySsid = savedNetworks[currentWifiIndex].ssid;
        String tryPass = savedNetworks[currentWifiIndex].pass;

        Serial.print("Attempting to connect to: "); Serial.println(trySsid);      
        WiFi.disconnect(); 
        WiFi.begin(trySsid.c_str(), tryPass.c_str()); 
      }
    }
  } else {
    // If we just successfully connected!
    if (wifiWasConnected == false) {
      Serial.println("\nWiFi connected to router!");
      Serial.print("Local IP address: "); Serial.println(WiFi.localIP());
      playWifiConnectSequence(); 
      playIPMorse(); // Trigger the Morse Code sequence
      wifiWasConnected = true;
      attemptsInCurrentCycle = 0; 
      
      if (apActive) {
        Serial.println("Shutting down AP Setup Network.");
        WiFi.mode(WIFI_STA);
        apActive = false;
      }
    }
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 4. Handle Web Server Requests 
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  WiFiClient client = server.available();

  if (client) {
    currentTime = millis();
    previousTime = currentTime;
    String currentLine = ""; 
    
    while (client.connected() && currentTime - previousTime <= timeoutTime) {
      currentTime = millis();
      if (client.available()) {
        char c = client.read();
        header += c;
        if (c == '\n') {
          if (currentLine.length() == 0) {
            
            // --- API PATH: Add Wi-Fi Network ---
            if (header.indexOf("GET /add_wifi?") >= 0) {
