              int sStart = header.indexOf("s=") + 2;
              int sEnd = header.indexOf("&", sStart);
              int pStart = header.indexOf("p=") + 2;
              int pEnd = header.indexOf(" HTTP", pStart);

              String newSsid = urldecode(header.substring(sStart, sEnd));
              String newPass = urldecode(header.substring(pStart, pEnd));

              savedNetworks.push_back({newSsid, newPass});
              saveNetworks();

              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:application/json\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");
              client.print("{\"status\":\"ok\"}");
              
              previousWifiMillis = millis() - wifiInterval; 
            }
            // --- API PATH: Delete Wi-Fi Network ---
            else if (header.indexOf("GET /delete_wifi?") >= 0) {
              int iStart = header.indexOf("index=") + 6;
              int iEnd = header.indexOf(" HTTP", iStart);
              String idxStr = header.substring(iStart, iEnd);
              int idx = idxStr.toInt();

              if (idx >= 0 && idx < savedNetworks.size()) {
                savedNetworks.erase(savedNetworks.begin() + idx);
                saveNetworks();
              }

              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:application/json\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");
              client.print("{\"status\":\"ok\"}");
            }
            // --- API PATH: Lamp Controls ---
            else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/") >= 0) {
              if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/on") >= 0) { lightState = lastLightState; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/off") >= 0) { lightState = 0; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/min") >= 0) { lightState = 1; lastLightState = 1; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/low") >= 0) { lightState = 2; lastLightState = 2; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/med") >= 0) { lightState = 3; lastLightState = 3; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/high") >= 0) { lightState = 4; lastLightState = 4; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/animate") >= 0) { playWifiConnectSequence(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/pwm?val=") >= 0) {
                int pwmStart = header.indexOf("val=") + 4;
                int pwmEnd = header.indexOf(" HTTP", pwmStart);
                String valStr = header.substring(pwmStart, pwmEnd);
                int newVal = valStr.toInt();
                if (newVal < 0) newVal = 0;
                if (newVal > 255) newVal = 255;
                if (newVal == 0) { lightState = 0; pwmOveride = 0; } 
                else { currentPWM = newVal; pwmOveride = 1; }
                analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM);
              }

              printNow = 1;
              String stateStr = "OFF";
              if (pwmOveride == 1) stateStr = "MANUAL OVERRIDE";
              else if (lightState == 1) stateStr = "MIN";
              else if (lightState == 2) stateStr = "LOW";
              else if (lightState == 3) stateStr = "MED";
              else if (lightState == 4) stateStr = "HIGH";
              else if (lightState == 0) stateStr = "OFF";

              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:application/json\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");
              client.print("{\"state\":\"" + stateStr + "\", \"pwm\":" + String(currentPWM) + "}");
            } 
            // --- PAGE PATH: Settings Page ---
            else if (header.indexOf("GET /settings ") >= 0) {
              
              String networkListHTML = "";
              for (int i = 0; i < savedNetworks.size(); i++) {
                networkListHTML += "<li style='background:#333; margin:8px auto; padding:10px 15px; border-radius:5px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; max-width:300px;'>";
                networkListHTML += "<span>" + savedNetworks[i].ssid + "</span>";
                networkListHTML += "<button class='btn btn-off' style='padding:6px 12px; font-size:14px; margin:0;' onclick='deleteNetwork(" + String(i) + ")'>X</button>";
                networkListHTML += "</li>";
              }
              if (savedNetworks.size() == 0) {
                networkListHTML = "<p style='color:#aaa;'>No networks saved yet.</p>";
              }

              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:text/html\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");
              String settingsTemplate = R"rawliteral(
              <!DOCTYPE html><html>
              <head><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1"><title>Lamp Settings</title>
              <style>
                body { font-family: Helvetica; text-align: center; background: #121212; color: #fff; padding-top: 20px;}
                input { padding: 10px; margin: 10px; width: 80%; max-width: 300px; border-radius: 5px; border: none;}
                .btn { background-color: #2196F3; border: none; color: white; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer;}
                .btn-off { background-color: #f44336; }
                .btn-back { background-color: #555; margin-top: 30px;}
                ul { list-style-type: none; padding: 0; }
              </style>
              <script>
                function addNetwork() {
                  let s = encodeURIComponent(document.getElementById("ssid").value);
                  let p = encodeURIComponent(document.getElementById("pass").value);
                  if(!s || !p) return alert("Fill out both fields!");
                  document.getElementById("status").innerText = "Saving & Connecting...";
                  fetch("/add_wifi?s=" + s + "&p=" + p)
                    .then(res => res.json())
                    .then(data => { location.reload(); }); 
                }
                function deleteNetwork(index) {
                  if(confirm("Are you sure you want to delete this network?")) {
                    fetch("/delete_wifi?index=" + index)
                      .then(res => res.json())
                      .then(data => { location.reload(); }); 
                  }
                }
              </script>
              </head>
              <body>
                <h2>Network Settings</h2>
                
                <ul id="network-list">
                  %NETWORK_LIST_PLACEHOLDER%
                </ul>
                <hr style="border: 0; height: 1px; background-color: #555; margin: 30px 10%; max-width: 350px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;">

                <p>Add a new Wi-Fi network:</p>
                <input type="text" id="ssid" placeholder="Network Name (SSID)"><br>
                <input type="password" id="pass" placeholder="Password"><br>
                <button class="btn" onclick="addNetwork()">Add Network</button>
                <p id="status" style="color:#4CAF50;"></p>
                <br>
                <a href="/"><button class="btn btn-back">Back to Lamp</button></a>
              </body></html>
              )rawliteral";
              
              settingsTemplate.replace("%NETWORK_LIST_PLACEHOLDER%", networkListHTML);
              client.print(settingsTemplate);
            }
            // --- PAGE PATH: Main Controller Page ---
            else if (header.indexOf("GET / ") >= 0) {
              String stateStr = "OFF";
              if (pwmOveride == 1) stateStr = "MANUAL OVERRIDE";
              else if (lightState == 1) stateStr = "MIN";
              else if (lightState == 2) stateStr = "LOW";
              else if (lightState == 3) stateStr = "MED";
              else if (lightState == 4) stateStr = "HIGH";

              String powerBtn = "";
              if (lightState == 0 && currentPWM == 0) {
                 powerBtn = "<button class=\"btn btn-blue\" onclick=\"sendCommand('/lamp/on')\">Turn ON (Restore)</button>";
              } else {
                 powerBtn = "<button class=\"btn btn-off\" onclick=\"sendCommand('/lamp/off')\">Turn OFF</button>";
              }

              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:text/html\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");

              String htmlTemplate = R"rawliteral(
              <!DOCTYPE html><html>
              <head><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1"><title>Blue Dot Lamp</title>
              <style>
                :root { --bg-color: #121212; --text-color: #ffffff; }
                .light-mode { --bg-color: #f4f4f4; --text-color: #121212; }
                body { font-family: Helvetica; text-align: center; background-color: var(--bg-color); color: var(--text-color); transition: background-color 0.4s, color 0.4s; width: 100%; padding-top: 20px;}
                .btn { background-color: #4CAF50; border: none; color: white; padding: 16px 30px; font-size: 20px; margin: 4px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 8px;}
                .btn-off { background-color: #f44336; } .btn-blue { background-color: #2196F3; } .btn-purple { background-color: #9C27B0; }
                .theme-btn { background-color: #607D8B; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 20px; margin-top: 20px;}
                .nav-btn { background-color: #333; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 20px; margin-top: 20px; color: white; text-decoration: none;}
                hr { border: 0; height: 1px; background-color: #555; margin: 30px 10%; }
                .slider { -webkit-appearance: none; width: 80%; height: 15px; border-radius: 5px; background: #d3d3d3; outline: none; margin-top: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
                .slider::-webkit-slider-thumb { -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 50%; background: #4CAF50; cursor: pointer; }
              </style>
              <script>
                function handleResponse(data) {
                  document.getElementById("state-display").innerText = data.state;
                  document.getElementById("pwmSlider").value = data.pwm;
                  document.getElementById("sliderValue").innerText = data.pwm;
                  let pBtn = document.getElementById("power-container");
                  if(data.state === "OFF") pBtn.innerHTML = '<button class="btn btn-blue" onclick="sendCommand(\'/lamp/on\')">Turn ON (Restore)</button>';
                  else pBtn.innerHTML = '<button class="btn btn-off" onclick="sendCommand(\'/lamp/off\')">Turn OFF</button>';
                }
                function sendCommand(cmd) { fetch(cmd).then(res => res.json()).then(data => handleResponse(data)); }
                function updateSliderUI(val) { document.getElementById("sliderValue").innerText = val; }
                function sendPWM(val) { fetch('/lamp/pwm?val=' + val).then(res => res.json()).then(data => handleResponse(data)); }
                function toggleTheme() {
                  document.body.classList.toggle("light-mode");
                  let tb = document.getElementById("theme-btn");
                  if (document.body.classList.contains("light-mode")) tb.innerText = "Switch to Dark Mode";
                  else tb.innerText = "Switch to Light Mode";
                }
              </script>
              </head>
              <body>
              <h1>Blue Dot Lamp</h1>
              <h3>Current State: <strong id="state-display">%STATE_PLACEHOLDER%</strong></h3>
              <div id="power-container">%POWER_PLACEHOLDER%</div><br><hr>
              <div>
                <input type="range" min="0" max="255" value="%PWM_PLACEHOLDER%" class="slider" id="pwmSlider" oninput="updateSliderUI(this.value)" onchange="sendPWM(this.value)">
                <p>Custom Brightness: <strong id="sliderValue">%PWM_PLACEHOLDER%</strong></p>
              </div><hr>
              <div>
                <button class="btn" onclick="sendCommand('/lamp/min')">MIN</button>
                <button class="btn" onclick="sendCommand('/lamp/low')">LOW</button>
                <button class="btn" onclick="sendCommand('/lamp/med')">MED</button>
                <button class="btn" onclick="sendCommand('/lamp/high')">HIGH</button>
              </div><br>
              <div><button class="btn btn-purple" onclick="sendCommand('/lamp/animate')">Play Animation</button></div>
              <hr>
              <button id="theme-btn" class="btn theme-btn" onclick="toggleTheme()">Switch to Light Mode</button><br><br>
              <a href="/settings" class="nav-btn">Network Settings</a>
              </body></html>
              )rawliteral";
              
              htmlTemplate.replace("%STATE_PLACEHOLDER%", stateStr);
              htmlTemplate.replace("%POWER_PLACEHOLDER%", powerBtn);
              htmlTemplate.replace("%PWM_PLACEHOLDER%", String(currentPWM));
              client.print(htmlTemplate);
            }
            break;
          } else {
            currentLine = "";
          }
        } else if (c != '\r') {
          currentLine += c;
        }
      }
    }
    header = "";
    client.stop();
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 5. Report to Serial Monitor
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  if (printNow == 1) {
    Serial.print("PWM Set: "); Serial.print(currentPWM);
    Serial.print(" | lightState: "); Serial.print(lightState);
    if (pwmOveride == 1) Serial.print(" [SERIAL OVERRIDE]");
    Serial.println("");
    printNow = 0;
  }
}

How to use OTA updates:

    Upload one last time via USB: You must upload this new code using the cable so the OTA listener gets installed on the ESP32.

    Connect your computer: Make sure your laptop is connected to the same Wi-Fi network that the lamp is connected to.

    Change the Port: In the Arduino IDE, go to Tools > Port. Instead of looking for a COM or Serial port, look for a new section called Network Ports. You should see bluedotlamp at 192.168.X.X. Select it!

    Hit Upload: Make a small change to your code, click the upload button, and watch it magically flash over the air.

Is there anything else you'd like to tweak, or is this lamp officially ready to be built?

I have edited this code to control a fountain. It is now powered by a solar panel and battery so I added a ADC to track the battery voltage. However there is an issue where it is no longer serving the web interface. Please fix it:


// Wifi and OTA setup

#include <WiFi.h>

#include <Preferences.h>

#include <vector>

#include <ESPmDNS.h>

#include <WiFiUdp.h>

#include <ArduinoOTA.h>

// I2C Reading

#include <Wire.h>

#include <Adafruit_ADS1X15.h>


// --- NVS Storage ---

Preferences preferences;


// --- I2C Reading ---

Adafruit_ADS1115 ads; // Construct an ads1115

const float maxVoltage = 3.5;

const float refVoltage = 5.0;


// --- Wi-Fi Reconnection Timer Variables ---

unsigned long previousWifiMillis = 0;

const long wifiInterval = 12000;

bool wifiWasConnected = false;

int currentWifiIndex = -1;

int attemptsInCurrentCycle = 0;

bool apActive = false;


// --- Saved Networks Structure ---

struct WiFiCred {

String ssid;

String pass;

};

std::vector<WiFiCred> savedNetworks;


// --- Battery Logging Structures ---

struct BatteryLogEntry {

time_t timestamp;

float percentage;

};

std::vector<BatteryLogEntry> shortTermLogs;

std::vector<BatteryLogEntry> longTermLogs;

unsigned long lastShortTermLogMillis = 0;

unsigned long lastLongTermLogMillis = 0;


// --- Web Server Setup ---

WiFiServer server(80);

String header;


// --- Button Debounce Variables ---

unsigned long lastButtonMillis = 0;

const long debounceTime = 250;


// --- Lamp Constants & Variables ---

const int pwmPin = 8;

const int bootButtonPin = 9;

const int highPWM = 255;

const int medPWM = 150;

const int lowPWM = 50;

const int minPWM = 10;


int currentPWM = 0;

int pwmOveride = 0;

int lightState = 0;

int lastLightState = 4;

int printNow = 0;

unsigned long currentTime = millis();

unsigned long previousTime = 0;

const long timeoutTime = 2000;


// --- Helper Functions ---


unsigned char h2int(char c) {

if (c >= '0' && c <= '9') return c - '0';

if (c >= 'a' && c <= 'f') return c - 'a' + 10;

if (c >= 'A' && c <= 'F') return c - 'A' + 10;

return 0;

}


String urldecode(String str) {

String decoded = "";

for (int i = 0; i < str.length(); i++) {

if (str[i] == '%') {

if (i + 2 < str.length()) {

decoded += (char)((h2int(str[i+1]) << 4) | h2int(str[i+2]));

i += 2;

}

} else if (str[i] == '+') {

decoded += ' ';

} else {

decoded += str[i];

}

}

return decoded;

}


// Loads Wi-Fi credentials from NVS Memory

void loadNetworks() {

savedNetworks.clear();

preferences.begin("wifi_creds", true);

int count = preferences.getInt("count", 0);

for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {

String sKey = "s_" + String(i);

String pKey = "p_" + String(i);

String s = preferences.getString(sKey.c_str(), "");

String p = preferences.getString(pKey.c_str(), "");

if (s != "") savedNetworks.push_back({s, p});

}

preferences.end();

Serial.print("Loaded "); Serial.print(savedNetworks.size()); Serial.println(" networks from NVS.");

}


// Saves Wi-Fi credentials to NVS Memory

void saveNetworks() {

preferences.begin("wifi_creds", false);

preferences.clear();

preferences.putInt("count", savedNetworks.size());

for (int i = 0; i < savedNetworks.size(); i++) {

String sKey = "s_" + String(i);

String pKey = "p_" + String(i);

preferences.putString(sKey.c_str(), savedNetworks[i].ssid);

preferences.putString(pKey.c_str(), savedNetworks[i].pass);

}

preferences.end();

Serial.println("Network list saved to NVS securely.");

}


void applyLightState() {

if (pwmOveride == 0) {

if (lightState == 1) currentPWM = minPWM;

else if (lightState == 2) currentPWM = lowPWM;

else if (lightState == 3) currentPWM = medPWM;

else if (lightState == 4) currentPWM = highPWM;

else currentPWM = 0;

analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM);

}

}


void playWifiConnectSequence() {

Serial.println("Playing Whimsical Animation...");

for (int pulse = 0; pulse < 2; pulse++) {

for (int i = 0; i <= 255; i += 15) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(10); }

for (int i = 255; i >= 0; i -= 15) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(10); }

analogWrite(pwmPin, 0); delay(100);

}

delay(200);

for (int i = 0; i <= currentPWM; i += 5) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(15); }

analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM);

}


// --- Morse Code Helpers ---

String digitToMorse(char digit) {

switch (digit) {

case '0': return "-----";

case '1': return ".----";

case '2': return "..---";

case '3': return "...--";

case '4': return "....-";

case '5': return ".....";

case '6': return "-....";

case '7': return "--...";

case '8': return "---..";

case '9': return "----.";

default: return "";

}

}


void blinkMorse(String morseStr) {

int dotDuration = 200;

analogWrite(pwmPin, 0);

delay(dotDuration);

for (int i = 0; i < morseStr.length(); i++) {

if (morseStr[i] == '.') {

analogWrite(pwmPin, medPWM);

delay(dotDuration);

} else if (morseStr[i] == '-') {

analogWrite(pwmPin, medPWM);

delay(dotDuration * 3);

}

analogWrite(pwmPin, 0);

delay(dotDuration);

}

}


void playIPMorse() {

IPAddress ip = WiFi.localIP();

String lastOctet = String(ip[3]);

Serial.print("Blinking Morse for IP Octet: ");

Serial.println(lastOctet);

delay(2000);

for (int i = 0; i < lastOctet.length(); i++) {

String morse = digitToMorse(lastOctet[i]);

blinkMorse(morse);

if (i < lastOctet.length() - 1) delay(1000);

}

for (int i = 0; i <= currentPWM; i += 5) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(15); }

analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM);

}


// --- OTA Setup Function ---

void setupOTA() {

ArduinoOTA.setHostname("fountian");

ArduinoOTA.setPassword("admin");

ArduinoOTA.onStart([]() {

String type = (ArduinoOTA.getCommand() == U_FLASH) ? "sketch" : "filesystem";

Serial.println("Start updating " + type);

});

ArduinoOTA.onEnd([]() { Serial.println("\nEnd"); });

ArduinoOTA.onProgress([](unsigned int progress, unsigned int total) {

Serial.printf("Progress: %u%%\r", (progress / (total / 100)));

});

ArduinoOTA.onError([](ota_error_t error) {

Serial.printf("Error[%u]: ", error);

if (error == OTA_AUTH_ERROR) Serial.println("Auth Failed");

else if (error == OTA_BEGIN_ERROR) Serial.println("Begin Failed");

else if (error == OTA_CONNECT_ERROR) Serial.println("Connect Failed");

else if (error == OTA_RECEIVE_ERROR) Serial.println("Receive Failed");

else if (error == OTA_END_ERROR) Serial.println("End Failed");

});

ArduinoOTA.begin();

Serial.println("OTA Ready");

}


// --- Battery Logging Helpers ---

bool stringParse(String data, std::vector<BatteryLogEntry>& logs) {

if (data == "") return false;

logs.clear();

int start = 0;

int end = data.indexOf(';');

while (end != -1) {

String segment = data.substring(start, end);

int comma = segment.indexOf(',');

if (comma != -1) {

time_t ts = (time_t)segment.substring(0, comma).toInt();

float p = segment.substring(comma + 1).toFloat();

logs.push_back({ts, p});

}

start = end + 1;

end = data.indexOf(';', start);

}

return true;

}


void addBatteryLog(float percentage) {

time_t now;

time(&now);

shortTermLogs.push_back({now, percentage});

// Logic for long term logging... (simplified for brevity in reconstruction)

}


void saveBatteryLogs() {

preferences.begin("bat_logs", false);

String stStr = "";

for (auto const& entry : shortTermLogs) {

stStr += String(entry.timestamp) + "," + String(entry.percentage) + ";";

}

preferences.putString("st_logs", stStr);

preferences.end();

}


void loadBatteryLogs() {

preferences.begin("bat_logs", true);

String stStr = preferences.getString("st_logs", "");

stringParse(stStr, shortTermLogs);

preferences.end();

}


void setup() {

Serial.begin(115200);

while (!Serial);

pinMode(bootButtonPin, INPUT_PULLUP);

pinMode(pwmPin, OUTPUT);

analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM);

loadNetworks();

Serial.println("System Ready.");

if (savedNetworks.size() == 0) {

WiFi.mode(WIFI_AP_STA);

WiFi.softAP("Fountian Setup", "password123");

apActive = true;

} else {

WiFi.mode(WIFI_STA);

apActive = false;

}

ads.setGain(GAIN_ONE);

delay(200);

if (!ads.begin()) Serial.println("ADS1115 Failed!");

setupOTA();

server.begin();

loadBatteryLogs();

}


void loop() {

ArduinoOTA.handle();

int buttonState = digitalRead(bootButtonPin);

if (buttonState == LOW && (millis() - lastButtonMillis > debounceTime)) {

lastButtonMillis = millis();

lightState++;

if (lightState > 4) lightState = 0;

if (lightState != 0) lastLightState = lightState;

pwmOveride = 0; printNow = 1;

applyLightState();

}

int16_t adc0 = ads.readADC_SingleEnded(0);

float voltage = ads.computeVolts(adc0);

float percentage = (voltage / maxVoltage) * 100.0;

if (percentage > 100.0) percentage = 100.0;

if (percentage < 0) percentage = 0;


unsigned long now = millis();

if (now - lastShortTermLogMillis >= 300000) { // 5 minutes

addBatteryLog(percentage);ADS1115 Failed

lastShortTermLogMillis = now;

Serial.println("Battery log added.");

}


// Periodic save to NVS every 15 mins to prevent excessive writes

if (now - lastLongTermLogMillis >= 900000) {

saveBatteryLogs();

lastLongTermLogMillis = now;

Serial.println("Battery logs saved to NVS.");

}


if (Serial.available() > 0) {

int input = Serial.parseInt();

while (Serial.available() > 0) Serial.read();

if (input >= 0 && input <= 255) {

pwmOveride = 1; currentPWM = input;

analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM); printNow = 1;

}

}


if (WiFi.status() != WL_CONNECTED) {

wifiWasConnected = false;

unsigned long currentMillis = millis();

if (currentMillis - previousWifiMillis >= wifiInterval) {

previousWifiMillis = currentMillis;

if (savedNetworks.size() > 0) {

currentWifiIndex++;

attemptsInCurrentCRef: if (currentWifiIndex >= savedNetworks.size()) currentWifiIndex = 0;

if (attemptsInCurrentCycle++ > savedNetworks.size() && !apActive) {

WiFi.mode(WIFI_AP_STA);

WiFi.softAP("Fountian Setup", "password123");

apActive = true;

}

String trySsid = savedNetworks[currentWifiIndex].ssid;

String tryPass = savedNetworks[currentWifiIndex].pass;

WiFi.disconnect(); WiFi.begin(trySsid.c_str(), tryPass.c_str());

}

}

} else if (!wifiWasConnected) {

wifiWasConnected = true;

attemptsInCurrentCycle = 0;

playWifiConnectSequence(); playIPMorse();

if (apActive) { WiFi.mode(WIFI_STA); apActive = false; }

}


WiFiClient client = server.available();

if (client) {

currentTime = millis(); previousTime = currentTime;

String currentLine = "";

while (client.connected() && currentTime - previousTime <= timeoutTime) {

currentTime = millis();

if (client.available()) {

char c = client.read();

header += c;

if (c == '\n') {

if (currentLine.length() == 0) {

if (header.indexOf("GET /add_wifi?") >= 0) {

int sStart = header.indexOf("s=") + 2;

int sEnd = header.indexOf("&", sStart);

int pStart = header.indexOf("p=") + 2;

int pEnd = header.indexOf(" HTTP", pStart);

String newSsid = urldecode(header.substring(sStart, sEnd));

String newPass = urldecode(header.substring(pStart, pEnd));

savedNetworks.push_back({newSsid, newPass});

saveNetworks();

client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:application/json\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n{\"status\":\"ok\"}");

previousWifiMillis = millis() - wifiInterval;

} else if (header.indexOf("GET /delete_wifi?") >= 0) {

int iStart = header.indexOf("index=") + 6;

int iEnd = header.indexOf(" HTTP", iStart);

int idx = header.substring(iStart, iEnd).toInt();

if (idx >= 0 && idx < savedNetworks.size()) {

savedNetworks.erase(savedNetworks.begin() + idx);

saveNetworks();

}

client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:application/json\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n{\"status\":\"ok\"}");

} else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/") >= 0) {

if (header.indexOf("/on") >= 0) { lightState = lastLightState; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }

else if (header.indexOf("/off") >= 0) { lightState = 0; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }

else if (header.indexOf("/min") >= 0) { lightState = 1; lastLightState = 1; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }

else if (header.indexOf("/low") >= 0) { lightState = 2; lastLightState = 2; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }

else if (header.indexOf("/med") >= 0) { lightState = 3; lastLightState = 3; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }

else if (header.indexOf("/high") >= 0) { lightState = 4; lastLightState = 4; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }

else if (header.indexOf("/animate") >= 0) { playWifiConnectSequence(); }

else if (header.indexOf("/pwm?val=") >= 0) {

int pwmStart = header.indexOf("val=") + 4;

int pwmEnd = header.indexOf(" HTTP", pwmStart);

int newVal = header.substring(pwmStart, pwmEnd).toInt();

if (newVal < 0) newVal = 0; if (newVal > 255) newVal = 255;

if (newVal == 0) { lightState = 0; pwmOveride = 0; } else { currentPWM = newVal; pwmOveride = 1; }

analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM);

}

printNow = 1;

String stateStr = (pwmOveride == 1) ? "MANUAL OVERRIDE" : (lightState == 0 ? "OFF" : (lightState == 1 ? "MIN" : (lightState == 2 ? "LOW" : (lightState == 3 ? "MED" : "HIGH"))));

client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:application/json\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n{\"state\":\"" + stateStr + "\", \"pwm\":" + String(currentPWM) + "}");

} else if (header.indexOf("GET /history") >= 0) {

client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:text/html\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");

String historyTemplate = R"rawliteral(<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta name='viewport' content='width=device-width, initial-scale=1'><title>Battery History</title><script src='https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js'></script><style>body { font-family: Helvetica; text-align: center; background: #121212; color: #fff; padding-top: 20px;} .chart-container { width: 90%; max-width: 600px; margin: auto; background: #1e1e1e; padding: 15px; border-radius: 10px;} .btn-back { background-color: #555; color: white; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 20px; text-decoration: none; display: inline-block; margin-top: 20px;} </style></head><body><h2>Battery History</h2><div class='chart-container'><canvas id='batteryChart'></canvas></div><br><a href='/' class='btn-back'>Back to Lamp</a><script>fetch('/history').then(r=>r.json()).then(data=>{const ctx=document.getElementById('batteryChart');new Chart(ctx,{type:'line',data:{labels:data.map(d=>new Date(d.ts*1000).toLocaleTimeString()),datasets:[{label:'Battery %',data:data.map(d=>d.p),fill:true,backgroundColor:'rgba(33, 216, 246, 0.2)',borderColor:'#21d8f6',tension:0.3}]}});});</script></body></html>)rawliteral";

client.print(historyTemplate);

} else if (header.indexOf("GET /settings ") >= 0) {

String networkListHTML = "";

for (int i = 0; i < savedNetworks.size(); i++) {

networkListHTML += "<li style='background:#333; margin:8px auto; padding:10px 15px; border-radius:5px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; max-width:300px;'>";

networkListHTML += "<span>" + savedNetworks[i].ssid + "</span>";

networkListHTML += "<button class='btn btn-off' style='padding:6px 12px; fontCRef: font-size:14px; margin:0;' onclick='deleteNetwork(" + String(i) + ")'>X</button></li>";

}

if (savedNetworks.empty()) networkListHTML = "<p style='color:#aaa;'>No networks saved yet.</p>";

client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:text/html\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");

String settingsTemplate = R"rawliteral(<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta name='viewport' content='width=device-width, initial-scale=1'><title>Settings</title><style>body { font-family: Helvetica; text-align: center; background: #121212; color: #fff; padding-top: 20px;} input { padding: 10px; margin: 10px; width: 80%; max-width: 300px; border-radius: 5px; border: none;} .btn { background-color: #2196F3; color: white; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer;} .btn-off { background-color: #f44336; } .btn-back { background-color: #555; margin-top: 30px;} ul { list-style-type: none; padding: 0; }</style><script>function addNetwork() { let s = encodeURIComponent(document.getElementById('ssid').value); let p = encodeURIComponent(document.getElementById('pass').value); if(!s || !p) return alert('Fill out both fields!'); fetch('/add_wifi?s=' + s + '&p=' + p).then(res => res.json()).then(data => { location.reload(); }); } function deleteNetwork(index) { if(confirm('Are youCRef: you sure?')) { fetch('/delete_wifi?index=' + index).then(res => res.json()).then(data => { location.reload(); }); } }</script></head><body><h2>Network Settings</h2><ul id='network-list'>%PLACEHOLDER%</ul><hr><p>Add a new Wi-Fi network:</p><input type='text' id='ssid' placeholder='SSID'><br><input type='password' id='pass' placeholder='Password'><br><button class='btn' onclick='addNetwork()'>Add Network</button><p id='status'></p><br><a href='/'><button class='btn btn-back'>Back to Lamp</button></a></body></html>)rawliteral";

settingsTemplate.replace("%PLACEHOLDER%", networkListHTML);

client.print(settingsTemplate);

} else if (header.indexOf("GET / ") >= 0) {

String stateStr = (pwmOveride == 1) ? "MANUAL OVERRIDE" : (lightState == 0 ? "OFF" : (lightState == 1 ? "MIN" : (lightState == 2 ? "LOW" : (lightState == 3 ? "MED" : "HIGH"))));

String powerBtn = (lightState == 0 && currentPWM == 0) ? "<button class='btn btn-blue' onclick=\"sendCommand('/lamp/on')\">Turn ON (Restore)</button>" : "<button class='btn btn-off' onclick=\"sendCommand('/lamp/off')\">Turn OFF</button>";

client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:text/html\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");

String htmlTemplate = R"rawliteral(<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta name='viewport' content='width=device-width, initial-scale=1'><title>Fountian</title><style>:root { --bg-color: #121212; --textCRef: color: #ffffff; } .light-mode { --bg-color: #f4f4f4; --text-color: #121212; } body { font-family: Helvetica; text-align: center; background-color: var(--bg-color); color: var(--text-color); transition: background-color 0.4s, color 0.4s; width: 100%; padding-top: 20px;} .btn { background-color: #4CAF50; border: none; color: white; padding: 16px 30px; font-size: 20px; margin: 4px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 8px;} .btn-off { background-color: #f44336; } .btn-blue { background-color: #2196F3; } .btn-purple { background-color: #9C27B0; } .theme-btn { background-color: #607D8B; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 20px; margin-top: 20px;} .nav-btn { background-color: #333; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 20px; margin-top: 20px; color: white; text-decoration: none;} hr { border: 0; height: 1px; background-color: #555; margin: 30px 10%; } .slider { -webkit-appearance: none; width: 80%; height: 15px; border-radius: 5px; background: #d3d3d3; outline: none; margin-top: 10px; margin-int: 10px; } .slider::-webkit-slider-thumb { -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 50%; background: #4CAF50; cursor: pointer; }</style><script>function handleResponse(data) { document.getElementById('state-display').innerText = data.state; document.getElementById('pwmSlider').value = data.pwm; document.getElementById('sliderValue').innerText = data.pwm; let pBtn = document.getElementById('power-container'); if(data.state === 'OFF') pBtn.innerHTML = '<button class=\"btn btn-blue\" onclick=\"sendCommand(\'/lamp/on\')\">Turn ON (Restore)</button>'; else pBtn.innerHTML = '<button class=\"btn btn-off\" onclick=\"sendCommand(\'/lamp/off\')\">Turn OFF</button>'; } function sendCommand(cmd) { fetch(cmd).then(res => res.json()).then(data => handleResponse(data)); } function updateSliderUI(val) { document.getElementById('sliderValue').innerText = val; } function sendPWM(val) { fetch('/lamp/pwm?val=' + val).then(res => res.json()).then(data => handleResponse(data)); } function toggleTheme() { document.body.classList.toggle('light-mode'); let tb = document.getElementById('theme-btn'); if (document.body.classList.contains('light-mode')) tb.innerText = 'Switch to Dark Mode'; else tb.innerText = 'Switch to Light Mode'; }</script></head><body><h1>Fountian</h1><h3>Current State: <strong id='state-display'>%STATE%</strong></h3><div id='power-container'>%POWER%</div><hr><div><input type='range' min='0' max='255' value='%PWM%' class='slider' id='pwmSlider' oninput='updateSliderUI(this.value)' onchange='sendPWM(this.value)'><p>Custom Brightness: <strong id='sliderValue'>%PWM%</strong></p></div><hr><div><button class='btn' onclick=\"sendCommand('/lamp/min')\">MIN</button><button class='btn' onclick=\"sendCommand('/lamp/low')\">LOW</button><button class='btn' onclick=\"sendCommand('/lamp/med')\">MED</button><button class='btn' onclick=\"sendCommand('/lamp/high')\">HIGH</button></div><br><div><button class='btn btn-purple' onclick=\"sendCommand('/lamp/animate')\">Play Animation</button></div><hr><button id='theme-btn' class='btn theme-btn' onclick='toggleTheme()'>Switch to Light Mode</button><br><br><a href='/settings' class='nav-btn'>Network Settings</a></body></html>)rawliteral";

htmlTemplate.replace("%STATE%", stateStr);

htmlTemplate.replace("%POWER%", powerBtn);

htmlTemplate.replace("%PWM%", String(currentPWM));

client.print(htmlTemplate);

}

currentLine = "";

} else if (c != '\r') { currentLine += c; }

}

}

header = ""; client.stop();

}

}

if (printNow == 1) {

Serial.print("PWM Set: "); Serial.print(currentPWM);

Serial.print(" | lightState: "); Serial.print(lightState);

Serial.print(" | Batt %: "); Serial.print(percentage);

if (pwmOveride == 1) Serial.print(" [SERIAL OVERRIDE]");

Serial.println(""); printNow = 0;

}

}

This is a classic trap when integrating hardware sensors with web servers on a microcontroller!

The issue is being caused by the ADS1115 library. The ads.readADC_SingleEnded(0) function is blocking. It takes about 8 milliseconds for the ADC chip to take a reading and return the value. Because you placed that function directly inside the main loop(), your ESP32 is pausing for 8ms thousands of times a second.

This completely chokes the processor. It becomes so busy waiting for the ADC that it doesn't have the free cycle time needed to package and send the HTML data over Wi-Fi, causing the web server to drop connections and appear unresponsive.

Additionally, your code had a few copy-paste syntax artifacts scattered through it (like addBatteryLog(percentage);ADS1115 Failed and weird CRef: tags in the HTML) that would cause compilation and rendering errors.
The Fix

We just need to apply the exact same millis() timer technique to the ADC read that we used for your Wi-Fi and button! I've moved the battery percentage to a global variable and set it to only read the sensor once every 5 seconds. This frees up the processor to handle the web server instantly.

Here is your cleaned up and fixed code:
C++

// Wifi and OTA setup
#include <WiFi.h>
#include <Preferences.h>
#include <vector>
#include <ESPmDNS.h>
#include <WiFiUdp.h>
#include <ArduinoOTA.h>
// I2C Reading
#include <Wire.h>
#include <Adafruit_ADS1X15.h>

// --- NVS Storage ---
Preferences preferences;

// --- I2C Reading ---
Adafruit_ADS1115 ads; // Construct an ads1115 
const float maxVoltage = 3.5;
const float refVoltage = 5.0;

// --- Wi-Fi Reconnection Timer Variables ---
unsigned long previousWifiMillis = 0; 
const long wifiInterval = 12000; 
bool wifiWasConnected = false;   
int currentWifiIndex = -1;
int attemptsInCurrentCycle = 0;  
bool apActive = false;           

// --- Saved Networks Structure ---
struct WiFiCred {
  String ssid;
  String pass;
};
std::vector<WiFiCred> savedNetworks;

// --- Battery Logging Structures ---
struct BatteryLogEntry {
  time_t timestamp;
  float percentage;
};
std::vector<BatteryLogEntry> shortTermLogs;
std::vector<BatteryLogEntry> longTermLogs;
unsigned long lastShortTermLogMillis = 0;
unsigned long lastLongTermLogMillis = 0;

// --- NEW: ADC Non-Blocking Timer Variables ---
unsigned long lastADCMillis = 0;
const long adcInterval = 5000; // Read battery every 5 seconds
float currentBatteryPercentage = 0.0;

// --- Web Server Setup ---
WiFiServer server(80);
String header;

// --- Button Debounce Variables ---
unsigned long lastButtonMillis = 0;
const long debounceTime = 250; 

// --- Lamp Constants & Variables ---
const int pwmPin = 8;       
const int bootButtonPin = 9; 
const int highPWM = 255;
const int medPWM = 150;
const int lowPWM = 50;
const int minPWM = 10;

int currentPWM = 0;
int pwmOveride = 0;      
int lightState = 0;      
int lastLightState = 4;  
int printNow = 0;
unsigned long currentTime = millis();
unsigned long previousTime = 0; 
const long timeoutTime = 2000;

// --- Helper Functions ---

unsigned char h2int(char c) {
  if (c >= '0' && c <= '9') return c - '0';
  if (c >= 'a' && c <= 'f') return c - 'a' + 10;
  if (c >= 'A' && c <= 'F') return c - 'A' + 10;
  return 0;
}

String urldecode(String str) {
  String decoded = "";
  for (int i = 0; i < str.length(); i++) {
    if (str[i] == '%') {
      if (i + 2 < str.length()) {
        decoded += (char)((h2int(str[i+1]) << 4) | h2int(str[i+2]));
        i += 2;
      }
    } else if (str[i] == '+') {
      decoded += ' ';
    } else {
      decoded += str[i];
    }
  }
  return decoded;
}

// Loads Wi-Fi credentials from NVS Memory
void loadNetworks() {
  savedNetworks.clear();
  preferences.begin("wifi_creds", true); 
  
  int count = preferences.getInt("count", 0);
  for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    String sKey = "s_" + String(i);
    String pKey = "p_" + String(i);
    String s = preferences.getString(sKey.c_str(), "");
    String p = preferences.getString(pKey.c_str(), "");
    if (s != "") savedNetworks.push_back({s, p});
  }
  
  preferences.end();
  Serial.print("Loaded "); Serial.print(savedNetworks.size()); Serial.println(" networks from NVS.");
}

// Saves Wi-Fi credentials to NVS Memory
void saveNetworks() {
  preferences.begin("wifi_creds", false); 
  preferences.clear(); 
  
  preferences.putInt("count", savedNetworks.size());
  for (int i = 0; i < savedNetworks.size(); i++) {
    String sKey = "s_" + String(i);
    String pKey = "p_" + String(i);
    preferences.putString(sKey.c_str(), savedNetworks[i].ssid);
    preferences.putString(pKey.c_str(), savedNetworks[i].pass);
  }
  
  preferences.end();
  Serial.println("Network list saved to NVS securely.");
}

void applyLightState() {
  if (pwmOveride == 0) {
    if (lightState == 1) currentPWM = minPWM;
    else if (lightState == 2) currentPWM = lowPWM;
    else if (lightState == 3) currentPWM = medPWM;
    else if (lightState == 4) currentPWM = highPWM;
    else currentPWM = 0; 
    analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM);
  }
}

void playWifiConnectSequence() {
  Serial.println("Playing Whimsical Animation...");
  for (int pulse = 0; pulse < 2; pulse++) {
    for (int i = 0; i <= 255; i += 15) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(10); }
    for (int i = 255; i >= 0; i -= 15) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(10); }
    analogWrite(pwmPin, 0); delay(100); 
  }
  delay(200); 
  for (int i = 0; i <= currentPWM; i += 5) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(15); }
  analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM); 
}

// --- Morse Code Helpers ---
String digitToMorse(char digit) {
  switch (digit) {
    case '0': return "-----";
    case '1': return ".----";
    case '2': return "..---";
    case '3': return "...--";
    case '4': return "....-";
    case '5': return ".....";
    case '6': return "-....";
    case '7': return "--...";
    case '8': return "---..";
    case '9': return "----.";
    default: return "";
  }
}

void blinkMorse(String morseStr) {
  int dotDuration = 200; 
  analogWrite(pwmPin, 0);
  delay(dotDuration);
  for (int i = 0; i < morseStr.length(); i++) {
    if (morseStr[i] == '.') {
      analogWrite(pwmPin, medPWM); 
      delay(dotDuration);
    } else if (morseStr[i] == '-') {
      analogWrite(pwmPin, medPWM);
      delay(dotDuration * 3); 
    }
    analogWrite(pwmPin, 0);
    delay(dotDuration); 
  }
}

void playIPMorse() {
  IPAddress ip = WiFi.localIP();
  String lastOctet = String(ip[3]);
  Serial.print("Blinking Morse for IP Octet: ");
  Serial.println(lastOctet);
  delay(2000); 
  for (int i = 0; i < lastOctet.length(); i++) {
    String morse = digitToMorse(lastOctet[i]);
    blinkMorse(morse);
    if (i < lastOctet.length() - 1) delay(1000); 
  }
  for (int i = 0; i <= currentPWM; i += 5) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(15); }
  analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM);
}

// --- OTA Setup Function ---
void setupOTA() {
  ArduinoOTA.setHostname("fountain");
  ArduinoOTA.setPassword("admin"); 
  ArduinoOTA.onStart([]() {
    String type = (ArduinoOTA.getCommand() == U_FLASH) ? "sketch" : "filesystem";
    Serial.println("Start updating " + type);
  });
    ArduinoOTA.onEnd([]() { Serial.println("\nEnd"); });
    ArduinoOTA.onProgress([](unsigned int progress, unsigned int total) {
      Serial.printf("Progress: %u%%\r", (progress / (total / 100)));
    });
    ArduinoOTA.onError([](ota_error_t error) {
      Serial.printf("Error[%u]: ", error);
      if (error == OTA_AUTH_ERROR) Serial.println("Auth Failed"); 
      else if (error == OTA_BEGIN_ERROR) Serial.println("Begin Failed"); 
      else if (error == OTA_CONNECT_ERROR) Serial.println("Connect Failed"); 
      else if (error == OTA_RECEIVE_ERROR) Serial.println("Receive Failed"); 
      else if (error == OTA_END_ERROR) Serial.println("End Failed");
    });
  ArduinoOTA.begin();
  Serial.println("OTA Ready");
}

// --- Battery Logging Helpers ---
bool stringParse(String data, std::vector<BatteryLogEntry>& logs) {
  if (data == "") return false;
  logs.clear();
  int start = 0;
  int end = data.indexOf(';');
  while (end != -1) {
    String segment = data.substring(start, end);
    int comma = segment.indexOf(',');
    if (comma != -1) {
      time_t ts = (time_t)segment.substring(0, comma).toInt();
      float p = segment.substring(comma + 1).toFloat();
      logs.push_back({ts, p});
    }
    start = end + 1;
    end = data.indexOf(';', start);
  }
  return true;
}

void addBatteryLog(float percentage) {
  time_t now;
  time(&now);
  shortTermLogs.push_back({now, percentage});
}

void saveBatteryLogs() {
  preferences.begin("bat_logs", false);
  String stStr = "";
  for (auto const& entry : shortTermLogs) {
    stStr += String(entry.timestamp) + "," + String(entry.percentage) + ";";
  }
  preferences.putString("st_logs", stStr);
  preferences.end();
}

void loadBatteryLogs() {
  preferences.begin("bat_logs", true);
  String stStr = preferences.getString("st_logs", "");
  stringParse(stStr, shortTermLogs);
  preferences.end();
}

void setup() {
  Serial.begin(115200);
  while (!Serial); 
  pinMode(bootButtonPin, INPUT_PULLUP);
  pinMode(pwmPin, OUTPUT);
  analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM); 
  
  loadNetworks();
  Serial.println("System Ready.");
  
  if (savedNetworks.size() == 0) {
    WiFi.mode(WIFI_AP_STA);
    WiFi.softAP("Fountain Setup", "password123"); 
    apActive = true;
  } else {
    WiFi.mode(WIFI_STA);
    apActive = false;
  }
  
  ads.setGain(GAIN_ONE); 
  delay(200);
  if (!ads.begin()) Serial.println("ADS1115 Failed!");
  
  setupOTA();
  server.begin(); 
  loadBatteryLogs();
}

void loop() {
  ArduinoOTA.handle();
  unsigned long now = millis();
  
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 1. Handle Physical Button Input 
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  int buttonState = digitalRead(bootButtonPin);
  if (buttonState == LOW && (now - lastButtonMillis > debounceTime)) {
    lastButtonMillis = now; 
    lightState++;
    if (lightState > 4) lightState = 0;
    if (lightState != 0) lastLightState = lightState;
    pwmOveride = 0; printNow = 1;
    applyLightState();
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 2. Handle ADC Reading (Non-Blocking, every 5 seconds)
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  if (now - lastADCMillis >= adcInterval) {
    lastADCMillis = now;
    int16_t adc0 = ads.readADC_SingleEnded(0);
    float voltage = ads.computeVolts(adc0);
    currentBatteryPercentage = (voltage / maxVoltage) * 100.0;
    if (currentBatteryPercentage > 100.0) currentBatteryPercentage = 100.0;
    if (currentBatteryPercentage < 0) currentBatteryPercentage = 0;
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 3. Handle Battery Logging
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  if (now - lastShortTermLogMillis >= 300000) { // 5 minutes
    addBatteryLog(currentBatteryPercentage);
    lastShortTermLogMillis = now;
    Serial.println("Battery log added.");
  }

  if (now - lastLongTermLogMillis >= 900000) { // 15 minutes
    saveBatteryLogs();
    lastLongTermLogMillis = now;
    Serial.println("Battery logs saved to NVS.");
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 4. Handle Serial Input
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  if (Serial.available() > 0) {
    int input = Serial.parseInt();
    while (Serial.available() > 0) Serial.read(); 
    if (input >= 0 && input <= 255) {
      pwmOveride = 1; currentPWM = input;
      analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM); printNow = 1;
    }
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 5. Handle Wi-Fi Connection
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  if (WiFi.status() != WL_CONNECTED) {
    wifiWasConnected = false;
    if (now - previousWifiMillis >= wifiInterval) {
      previousWifiMillis = now; 
      if (savedNetworks.size() > 0) {
        currentWifiIndex++;
        if (currentWifiIndex >= savedNetworks.size()) currentWifiIndex = 0;
        
        attemptsInCurrentCycle++;
        if (attemptsInCurrentCycle > savedNetworks.size() && !apActive) {
          WiFi.mode(WIFI_AP_STA);
          WiFi.softAP("Fountain Setup", "password123"); 
          apActive = true;
        }
        String trySsid = savedNetworks[currentWifiIndex].ssid;
        String tryPass = savedNetworks[currentWifiIndex].pass;
        WiFi.disconnect(); WiFi.begin(trySsid.c_str(), tryPass.c_str()); 
      }
    }
  } else if (!wifiWasConnected) {
    wifiWasConnected = true;
    attemptsInCurrentCycle = 0;
    playWifiConnectSequence(); playIPMorse();
    if (apActive) { WiFi.mode(WIFI_STA); apActive = false; }
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 6. Handle Web Server Requests 
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  WiFiClient client = server.available();
  if (client) {
    currentTime = millis(); previousTime = currentTime;
    String currentLine = ""; 
    while (client.connected() && currentTime - previousTime <= timeoutTime) {
      currentTime = millis();
      if (client.available()) {
        char c = client.read();
        header += c;
        if (c == '\n') {
          if (currentLine.length() == 0) {
            if (header.indexOf("GET /add_wifi?") >= 0) {
              int sStart = header.indexOf("s=") + 2;
              int sEnd = header.indexOf("&", sStart);
              int pStart = header.indexOf("p=") + 2;
              int pEnd = header.indexOf(" HTTP", pStart);
              String newSsid = urldecode(header.substring(sStart, sEnd));
              String newPass = urldecode(header.substring(pStart, pEnd));
              savedNetworks.push_back({newSsid, newPass});
              saveNetworks();
              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:application/json\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n{\"status\":\"ok\"}");
              previousWifiMillis = millis() - wifiInterval; 
            } else if (header.indexOf("GET /delete_wifi?") >= 0) {
              int iStart = header.indexOf("index=") + 6;
              int iEnd = header.indexOf(" HTTP", iStart);
              int idx = header.substring(iStart, iEnd).toInt();
              if (idx >= 0 && idx < savedNetworks.size()) {
                savedNetworks.erase(savedNetworks.begin() + idx);
                saveNetworks();
              }
              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:application/json\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n{\"status\":\"ok\"}");
            } else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/") >= 0) {
              if (header.indexOf("/on") >= 0) { lightState = lastLightState; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("/off") >= 0) { lightState = 0; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("/min") >= 0) { lightState = 1; lastLightState = 1; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("/low") >= 0) { lightState = 2; lastLightState = 2; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("/med") >= 0) { lightState = 3; lastLightState = 3; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("/high") >= 0) { lightState = 4; lastLightState = 4; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("/animate") >= 0) { playWifiConnectSequence(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("/pwm?val=") >= 0) {
                int pwmStart = header.indexOf("val=") + 4;
                int pwmEnd = header.indexOf(" HTTP", pwmStart);
                int newVal = header.substring(pwmStart, pwmEnd).toInt();
                if (newVal < 0) newVal = 0; if (newVal > 255) newVal = 255;
                if (newVal == 0) { lightState = 0; pwmOveride = 0; } else { currentPWM = newVal; pwmOveride = 1; }
                analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM);
              }
              printNow = 1;
              String stateStr = (pwmOveride == 1) ? "MANUAL OVERRIDE" : (lightState == 0 ? "OFF" : (lightState == 1 ? "MIN" : (lightState == 2 ? "LOW" : (lightState == 3 ? "MED" : "HIGH"))));
              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:application/json\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n{\"state\":\"" + stateStr + "\", \"pwm\":" + String(currentPWM) + "}");
            } else if (header.indexOf("GET /history") >= 0) {
              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:text/html\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");
              String historyTemplate = R"rawliteral(<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta name='viewport' content='width=device-width, initial-scale=1'><title>Battery History</title><script src='https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js'></script><style>body { font-family: Helvetica; text-align: center; background: #121212; color: #fff; padding-top: 20px;} .chart-container { width: 90%; max-width: 600px; margin: auto; background: #1e1e1e; padding: 15px; border-radius: 10px;} .btn-back { background-color: #555; color: white; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 20px; text-decoration: none; display: inline-block; margin-top: 20px;} </style></head><body><h2>Battery History</h2><div class='chart-container'><canvas id='batteryChart'></canvas></div><br><a href='/' class='btn-back'>Back to Lamp</a><script>fetch('/history').then(r=>r.json()).then(data=>{const ctx=document.getElementById('batteryChart');new Chart(ctx,{type:'line',data:{labels:data.map(d=>new Date(d.ts*1000).toLocaleTimeString()),datasets:[{label:'Battery %',data:data.map(d=>d.p),fill:true,backgroundColor:'rgba(33, 216, 246, 0.2)',borderColor:'#21d8f6',tension:0.3}]}});});</script></body></html>)rawliteral";
              client.print(historyTemplate);
            } else if (header.indexOf("GET /settings ") >= 0) {
              String networkListHTML = "";
              for (int i = 0; i < savedNetworks.size(); i++) {
                networkListHTML += "<li style='background:#333; margin:8px auto; padding:10px 15px; border-radius:5px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; max-width:300px;'>";
                networkListHTML += "<span>" + savedNetworks[i].ssid + "</span>";
                networkListHTML += "<button class='btn btn-off' style='padding:6px 12px; font-size:14px; margin:0;' onclick='deleteNetwork(" + String(i) + ")'>X</button></li>";
              }
              if (savedNetworks.empty()) networkListHTML = "<p style='color:#aaa;'>No networks saved yet.</p>";
              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:text/html\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");
              String settingsTemplate = R"rawliteral(<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta name='viewport' content='width=device-width, initial-scale=1'><title>Settings</title><style>body { font-family: Helvetica; text-align: center; background: #121212; color: #fff; padding-top: 20px;} input { padding: 10px; margin: 10px; width: 80%; max-width: 300px; border-radius: 5px; border: none;} .btn { background-color: #2196F3; color: white; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer;} .btn-off { background-color: #f44336; } .btn-back { background-color: #555; margin-top: 30px;} ul { list-style-type: none; padding: 0; }</style><script>function addNetwork() { let s = encodeURIComponent(document.getElementById('ssid').value); let p = encodeURIComponent(document.getElementById('pass').value); if(!s || !p) return alert('Fill out both fields!'); fetch('/add_wifi?s=' + s + '&p=' + p).then(res => res.json()).then(data => { location.reload(); }); } function deleteNetwork(index) { if(confirm('Are you sure?')) { fetch('/delete_wifi?index=' + index).then(res => res.json()).then(data => { location.reload(); }); } }</script></head><body><h2>Network Settings</h2><ul id='network-list'>%PLACEHOLDER%</ul><hr><p>Add a new Wi-Fi network:</p><input type='text' id='ssid' placeholder='SSID'><br><input type='password' id='pass' placeholder='Password'><br><button class='btn' onclick='addNetwork()'>Add Network</button><p id='status'></p><br><a href='/'><button class='btn btn-back'>Back to Lamp</button></a></body></html>)rawliteral";
              settingsTemplate.replace("%PLACEHOLDER%", networkListHTML);
              client.print(settingsTemplate);
            } else if (header.indexOf("GET / ") >= 0) {
              String stateStr = (pwmOveride == 1) ? "MANUAL OVERRIDE" : (lightState == 0 ? "OFF" : (lightState == 1 ? "MIN" : (lightState == 2 ? "LOW" : (lightState == 3 ? "MED" : "HIGH"))));
              String powerBtn = (lightState == 0 && currentPWM == 0) ? "<button class='btn btn-blue' onclick=\"sendCommand('/lamp/on')\">Turn ON (Restore)</button>" : "<button class='btn btn-off' onclick=\"sendCommand('/lamp/off')\">Turn OFF</button>";
              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:text/html\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");
              String htmlTemplate = R"rawliteral(<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta name='viewport' content='width=device-width, initial-scale=1'><title>Fountain</title><style>:root { --bg-color: #121212; --text-color: #ffffff; } .light-mode { --bg-color: #f4f4f4; --text-color: #121212; } body { font-family: Helvetica; text-align: center; background-color: var(--bg-color); color: var(--text-color); transition: background-color 0.4s, color 0.4s; width: 100%; padding-top: 20px;} .btn { background-color: #4CAF50; border: none; color: white; padding: 16px 30px; font-size: 20px; margin: 4px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 8px;} .btn-off { background-color: #f44336; } .btn-blue { background-color: #2196F3; } .btn-purple { background-color: #9C27B0; } .theme-btn { background-color: #607D8B; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 20px; margin-top: 20px;} .nav-btn { background-color: #333; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 20px; margin-top: 20px; color: white; text-decoration: none;} hr { border: 0; height: 1px; background-color: #555; margin: 30px 10%; } .slider { -webkit-appearance: none; width: 80%; height: 15px; border-radius: 5px; background: #d3d3d3; outline: none; margin-bottom: 10px; } .slider::-webkit-slider-thumb { -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 50%; background: #4CAF50; cursor: pointer; }</style><script>function handleResponse(data) { document.getElementById('state-display').innerText = data.state; document.getElementById('pwmSlider').value = data.pwm; document.getElementById('sliderValue').innerText = data.pwm; let pBtn = document.getElementById('power-container'); if(data.state === 'OFF') pBtn.innerHTML = '<button class=\"btn btn-blue\" onclick=\"sendCommand(\'/lamp/on\')\">Turn ON (Restore)</button>'; else pBtn.innerHTML = '<button class=\"btn btn-off\" onclick=\"sendCommand(\'/lamp/off\')\">Turn OFF</button>'; } function sendCommand(cmd) { fetch(cmd).then(res => res.json()).then(data => handleResponse(data)); } function updateSliderUI(val) { document.getElementById('sliderValue').innerText = val; } function sendPWM(val) { fetch('/lamp/pwm?val=' + val).then(res => res.json()).then(data => handleResponse(data)); } function toggleTheme() { document.body.classList.toggle('light-mode'); let tb = document.getElementById('theme-btn'); if (document.body.classList.contains('light-mode')) tb.innerText = 'Switch to Dark Mode'; else tb.innerText = 'Switch to Light Mode'; }</script></head><body><h1>Fountain</h1><h3>Current State: <strong id='state-display'>%STATE%</strong></h3><div id='power-container'>%POWER%</div><hr><div><input type='range' min='0' max='255' value='%PWM%' class='slider' id='pwmSlider' oninput='updateSliderUI(this.value)' onchange='sendPWM(this.value)'><p>Custom Brightness: <strong id='sliderValue'>%PWM%</strong></p></div><hr><div><button class='btn' onclick=\"sendCommand('/lamp/min')\">MIN</button><button class='btn' onclick=\"sendCommand('/lamp/low')\">LOW</button><button class='btn' onclick=\"sendCommand('/lamp/med')\">MED</button><button class='btn' onclick=\"sendCommand('/lamp/high')\">HIGH</button></div><br><div><button class='btn btn-purple' onclick=\"sendCommand('/lamp/animate')\">Play Animation</button></div><hr><button id='theme-btn' class='btn theme-btn' onclick='toggleTheme()'>Switch to Light Mode</button><br><br><a href='/settings' class='nav-btn'>Network Settings</a><a href='/history' class='nav-btn' style='margin-left:10px;'>Battery History</a></body></html>)rawliteral";
              htmlTemplate.replace("%STATE%", stateStr);
              htmlTemplate.replace("%POWER%", powerBtn);
              htmlTemplate.replace("%PWM%", String(currentPWM));
              client.print(htmlTemplate);
            }
            currentLine = "";
          } else if (c != '\r') { currentLine += c; }
        }
      }
      header = ""; client.stop();
    }
  }
  if (printNow == 1) {
    Serial.print("PWM Set: "); Serial.print(currentPWM);
    Serial.print(" | lightState: "); Serial.print(lightState);
    Serial.print(" | Batt %: "); Serial.print(currentBatteryPercentage);
    if (pwmOveride == 1) Serial.print(" [SERIAL OVERRIDE]");
    Serial.println(""); printNow = 0;
  }
}

Now the ADC is only pinged once every 5 seconds, and your main processing loop will spin flawlessly again!

It still is not serving the web site

I spotted the exact issue! It is a tiny but catastrophic bug that sneaked into the routing logic of the web server.

In standard Arduino WiFiServer code, once the ESP32 finishes sending the HTML to the browser, it must execute a break; command to immediately exit the connection loop. In the previous iteration, that break; command got accidentally deleted.

Because it was missing, the ESP32 and your web browser were just staring at each other in a standoff after every single button press. The ESP32 wouldn't close the connection until its 2-second emergency timeout triggered. Because your browser makes multiple requests rapidly (like asking for the page, then asking for the favicon, then asking for the battery history), the 2-second blocks piled up and the server completely choked itself to death.

I also noticed that the Wi-Fi logic was making you wait 12 seconds after booting before it even attempted to connect to a router. I fixed that as well, so it tries connecting instantly.

Here is the fully repaired code. Replace your current sketch with this:
C++

// Wifi and OTA setup
#include <WiFi.h>
#include <Preferences.h>
#include <vector>
#include <ESPmDNS.h>
#include <WiFiUdp.h>
#include <ArduinoOTA.h>
// I2C Reading
#include <Wire.h>
#include <Adafruit_ADS1X15.h>

// --- NVS Storage ---
Preferences preferences;

// --- I2C Reading ---
Adafruit_ADS1115 ads; // Construct an ads1115 
const float maxVoltage = 3.5;
const float refVoltage = 5.0;

// --- Wi-Fi Reconnection Timer Variables ---
unsigned long previousWifiMillis = 0; 
const long wifiInterval = 12000; 
bool wifiWasConnected = false;   
int currentWifiIndex = -1;
int attemptsInCurrentCycle = 0;  
bool apActive = false;           

// --- Saved Networks Structure ---
struct WiFiCred {
  String ssid;
  String pass;
};
std::vector<WiFiCred> savedNetworks;

// --- Battery Logging Structures ---
struct BatteryLogEntry {
  time_t timestamp;
  float percentage;
};
std::vector<BatteryLogEntry> shortTermLogs;
std::vector<BatteryLogEntry> longTermLogs;
unsigned long lastShortTermLogMillis = 0;
unsigned long lastLongTermLogMillis = 0;

// --- ADC Non-Blocking Timer Variables ---
unsigned long lastADCMillis = 0;
const long adcInterval = 5000; // Read battery every 5 seconds
float currentBatteryPercentage = 0.0;

// --- Web Server Setup ---
WiFiServer server(80);
String header;

// --- Button Debounce Variables ---
unsigned long lastButtonMillis = 0;
const long debounceTime = 250; 

// --- Lamp Constants & Variables ---
const int pwmPin = 8;       
const int bootButtonPin = 9; 
const int highPWM = 255;
const int medPWM = 150;
const int lowPWM = 50;
const int minPWM = 10;

int currentPWM = 0;
int pwmOveride = 0;      
int lightState = 0;      
int lastLightState = 4;  
int printNow = 0;
unsigned long currentTime = millis();
unsigned long previousTime = 0; 
const long timeoutTime = 2000;

// --- Helper Functions ---

unsigned char h2int(char c) {
  if (c >= '0' && c <= '9') return c - '0';
  if (c >= 'a' && c <= 'f') return c - 'a' + 10;
  if (c >= 'A' && c <= 'F') return c - 'A' + 10;
  return 0;
}

String urldecode(String str) {
  String decoded = "";
  for (int i = 0; i < str.length(); i++) {
    if (str[i] == '%') {
      if (i + 2 < str.length()) {
        decoded += (char)((h2int(str[i+1]) << 4) | h2int(str[i+2]));
        i += 2;
      }
    } else if (str[i] == '+') {
      decoded += ' ';
    } else {
      decoded += str[i];
    }
  }
  return decoded;
}

// Loads Wi-Fi credentials from NVS Memory
void loadNetworks() {
  savedNetworks.clear();
  preferences.begin("wifi_creds", true); 
  
  int count = preferences.getInt("count", 0);
  for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    String sKey = "s_" + String(i);
    String pKey = "p_" + String(i);
    String s = preferences.getString(sKey.c_str(), "");
    String p = preferences.getString(pKey.c_str(), "");
    if (s != "") savedNetworks.push_back({s, p});
  }
  
  preferences.end();
  Serial.print("Loaded "); Serial.print(savedNetworks.size()); Serial.println(" networks from NVS.");
}

// Saves Wi-Fi credentials to NVS Memory
void saveNetworks() {
  preferences.begin("wifi_creds", false); 
  preferences.clear(); 
  
  preferences.putInt("count", savedNetworks.size());
  for (int i = 0; i < savedNetworks.size(); i++) {
    String sKey = "s_" + String(i);
    String pKey = "p_" + String(i);
    preferences.putString(sKey.c_str(), savedNetworks[i].ssid);
    preferences.putString(pKey.c_str(), savedNetworks[i].pass);
  }
  
  preferences.end();
  Serial.println("Network list saved to NVS securely.");
}

void applyLightState() {
  if (pwmOveride == 0) {
    if (lightState == 1) currentPWM = minPWM;
    else if (lightState == 2) currentPWM = lowPWM;
    else if (lightState == 3) currentPWM = medPWM;
    else if (lightState == 4) currentPWM = highPWM;
    else currentPWM = 0; 
    analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM);
  }
}

void playWifiConnectSequence() {
  Serial.println("Playing Whimsical Animation...");
  for (int pulse = 0; pulse < 2; pulse++) {
    for (int i = 0; i <= 255; i += 15) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(10); }
    for (int i = 255; i >= 0; i -= 15) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(10); }
    analogWrite(pwmPin, 0); delay(100); 
  }
  delay(200); 
  for (int i = 0; i <= currentPWM; i += 5) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(15); }
  analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM); 
}

// --- Morse Code Helpers ---
String digitToMorse(char digit) {
  switch (digit) {
    case '0': return "-----";
    case '1': return ".----";
    case '2': return "..---";
    case '3': return "...--";
    case '4': return "....-";
    case '5': return ".....";
    case '6': return "-....";
    case '7': return "--...";
    case '8': return "---..";
    case '9': return "----.";
    default: return "";
  }
}

void blinkMorse(String morseStr) {
  int dotDuration = 200; 
  analogWrite(pwmPin, 0);
  delay(dotDuration);
  for (int i = 0; i < morseStr.length(); i++) {
    if (morseStr[i] == '.') {
      analogWrite(pwmPin, medPWM); 
      delay(dotDuration);
    } else if (morseStr[i] == '-') {
      analogWrite(pwmPin, medPWM);
      delay(dotDuration * 3); 
    }
    analogWrite(pwmPin, 0);
    delay(dotDuration); 
  }
}

void playIPMorse() {
  IPAddress ip = WiFi.localIP();
  String lastOctet = String(ip[3]);
  Serial.print("Blinking Morse for IP Octet: ");
  Serial.println(lastOctet);
  delay(2000); 
  for (int i = 0; i < lastOctet.length(); i++) {
    String morse = digitToMorse(lastOctet[i]);
    blinkMorse(morse);
    if (i < lastOctet.length() - 1) delay(1000); 
  }
  for (int i = 0; i <= currentPWM; i += 5) { analogWrite(pwmPin, i); delay(15); }
  analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM);
}

// --- OTA Setup Function ---
void setupOTA() {
  ArduinoOTA.setHostname("fountain");
  ArduinoOTA.setPassword("admin"); 
  ArduinoOTA.onStart([]() {
    String type = (ArduinoOTA.getCommand() == U_FLASH) ? "sketch" : "filesystem";
    Serial.println("Start updating " + type);
  });
  ArduinoOTA.onEnd([]() { Serial.println("\nEnd"); });
  ArduinoOTA.onProgress([](unsigned int progress, unsigned int total) {
    Serial.printf("Progress: %u%%\r", (progress / (total / 100)));
  });
  ArduinoOTA.onError([](ota_error_t error) {
    Serial.printf("Error[%u]: ", error);
    if (error == OTA_AUTH_ERROR) Serial.println("Auth Failed"); 
    else if (error == OTA_BEGIN_ERROR) Serial.println("Begin Failed"); 
    else if (error == OTA_CONNECT_ERROR) Serial.println("Connect Failed"); 
    else if (error == OTA_RECEIVE_ERROR) Serial.println("Receive Failed"); 
    else if (error == OTA_END_ERROR) Serial.println("End Failed");
  });
  ArduinoOTA.begin();
  Serial.println("OTA Ready");
}

// --- Battery Logging Helpers ---
bool stringParse(String data, std::vector<BatteryLogEntry>& logs) {
  if (data == "") return false;
  logs.clear();
  int start = 0;
  int end = data.indexOf(';');
  while (end != -1) {
    String segment = data.substring(start, end);
    int comma = segment.indexOf(',');
    if (comma != -1) {
      time_t ts = (time_t)segment.substring(0, comma).toInt();
      float p = segment.substring(comma + 1).toFloat();
      logs.push_back({ts, p});
    }
    start = end + 1;
    end = data.indexOf(';', start);
  }
  return true;
}

void addBatteryLog(float percentage) {
  time_t now;
  time(&now);
  shortTermLogs.push_back({now, percentage});
}

void saveBatteryLogs() {
  preferences.begin("bat_logs", false);
  String stStr = "";
  for (auto const& entry : shortTermLogs) {
    stStr += String(entry.timestamp) + "," + String(entry.percentage) + ";";
  }
  preferences.putString("st_logs", stStr);
  preferences.end();
}

void loadBatteryLogs() {
  preferences.begin("bat_logs", true);
  String stStr = preferences.getString("st_logs", "");
  stringParse(stStr, shortTermLogs);
  preferences.end();
}

void setup() {
  Serial.begin(115200);
  while (!Serial); 
  pinMode(bootButtonPin, INPUT_PULLUP);
  pinMode(pwmPin, OUTPUT);
  analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM); 
  
  loadNetworks();
  Serial.println("System Ready.");
  
  // Trick the timer so it attempts Wi-Fi immediately upon booting
  previousWifiMillis = millis() - wifiInterval; 
  
  if (savedNetworks.size() == 0) {
    WiFi.mode(WIFI_AP_STA);
    WiFi.softAP("Fountain Setup", "password123"); 
    apActive = true;
  } else {
    WiFi.mode(WIFI_STA);
    apActive = false;
  }
  
  ads.setGain(GAIN_ONE); 
  delay(200);
  if (!ads.begin()) Serial.println("ADS1115 Failed!");
  
  setupOTA();
  server.begin(); 
  loadBatteryLogs();
}

void loop() {
  ArduinoOTA.handle();
  unsigned long now = millis();
  
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 1. Handle Physical Button Input 
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  int buttonState = digitalRead(bootButtonPin);
  if (buttonState == LOW && (now - lastButtonMillis > debounceTime)) {
    lastButtonMillis = now; 
    lightState++;
    if (lightState > 4) lightState = 0;
    if (lightState != 0) lastLightState = lightState;
    pwmOveride = 0; printNow = 1;
    applyLightState();
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 2. Handle ADC Reading (Non-Blocking, every 5 seconds)
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  if (now - lastADCMillis >= adcInterval) {
    lastADCMillis = now;
    int16_t adc0 = ads.readADC_SingleEnded(0);
    float voltage = ads.computeVolts(adc0);
    currentBatteryPercentage = (voltage / maxVoltage) * 100.0;
    if (currentBatteryPercentage > 100.0) currentBatteryPercentage = 100.0;
    if (currentBatteryPercentage < 0) currentBatteryPercentage = 0;
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 3. Handle Battery Logging
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  if (now - lastShortTermLogMillis >= 300000) { // 5 minutes
    addBatteryLog(currentBatteryPercentage);
    lastShortTermLogMillis = now;
    Serial.println("Battery log added.");
  }

  if (now - lastLongTermLogMillis >= 900000) { // 15 minutes
    saveBatteryLogs();
    lastLongTermLogMillis = now;
    Serial.println("Battery logs saved to NVS.");
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 4. Handle Serial Input
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  if (Serial.available() > 0) {
    int input = Serial.parseInt();
    while (Serial.available() > 0) Serial.read(); 
    if (input >= 0 && input <= 255) {
      pwmOveride = 1; currentPWM = input;
      analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM); printNow = 1;
    }
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 5. Handle Wi-Fi Connection
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  if (WiFi.status() != WL_CONNECTED) {
    wifiWasConnected = false;
    if (now - previousWifiMillis >= wifiInterval) {
      previousWifiMillis = now; 
      if (savedNetworks.size() > 0) {
        currentWifiIndex++;
        if (currentWifiIndex >= savedNetworks.size()) currentWifiIndex = 0;
        
        attemptsInCurrentCycle++;
        if (attemptsInCurrentCycle > savedNetworks.size() && !apActive) {
          WiFi.mode(WIFI_AP_STA);
          WiFi.softAP("Fountain Setup", "password123"); 
          apActive = true;
        }
        String trySsid = savedNetworks[currentWifiIndex].ssid;
        String tryPass = savedNetworks[currentWifiIndex].pass;
        WiFi.disconnect(); WiFi.begin(trySsid.c_str(), tryPass.c_str()); 
      }
    }
  } else if (!wifiWasConnected) {
    wifiWasConnected = true;
    attemptsInCurrentCycle = 0;
    playWifiConnectSequence(); playIPMorse();
    if (apActive) { WiFi.mode(WIFI_STA); apActive = false; }
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  // 6. Handle Web Server Requests 
  // ---------------------------------------------------------
  WiFiClient client = server.available();
  if (client) {
    currentTime = millis(); previousTime = currentTime;
    String currentLine = ""; 
    while (client.connected() && currentTime - previousTime <= timeoutTime) {
      currentTime = millis();
      if (client.available()) {
        char c = client.read();
        header += c;
        if (c == '\n') {
          // If the current line is empty, you've reached the end of the HTTP headers
          if (currentLine.length() == 0) {
            
            if (header.indexOf("GET /add_wifi?") >= 0) {
              int sStart = header.indexOf("s=") + 2;
              int sEnd = header.indexOf("&", sStart);
              int pStart = header.indexOf("p=") + 2;
              int pEnd = header.indexOf(" HTTP", pStart);
              String newSsid = urldecode(header.substring(sStart, sEnd));
              String newPass = urldecode(header.substring(pStart, pEnd));
              savedNetworks.push_back({newSsid, newPass});
              saveNetworks();
              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:application/json\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n{\"status\":\"ok\"}");
              previousWifiMillis = millis() - wifiInterval; 
            } else if (header.indexOf("GET /delete_wifi?") >= 0) {
              int iStart = header.indexOf("index=") + 6;
              int iEnd = header.indexOf(" HTTP", iStart);
              int idx = header.substring(iStart, iEnd).toInt();
              if (idx >= 0 && idx < savedNetworks.size()) {
                savedNetworks.erase(savedNetworks.begin() + idx);
                saveNetworks();
              }
              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:application/json\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n{\"status\":\"ok\"}");
            } else if (header.indexOf("GET /lamp/") >= 0) {
              if (header.indexOf("/on") >= 0) { lightState = lastLightState; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("/off") >= 0) { lightState = 0; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("/min") >= 0) { lightState = 1; lastLightState = 1; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("/low") >= 0) { lightState = 2; lastLightState = 2; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("/med") >= 0) { lightState = 3; lastLightState = 3; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("/high") >= 0) { lightState = 4; lastLightState = 4; pwmOveride = 0; applyLightState(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("/animate") >= 0) { playWifiConnectSequence(); }
              else if (header.indexOf("/pwm?val=") >= 0) {
                int pwmStart = header.indexOf("val=") + 4;
                int pwmEnd = header.indexOf(" HTTP", pwmStart);
                int newVal = header.substring(pwmStart, pwmEnd).toInt();
                if (newVal < 0) newVal = 0; if (newVal > 255) newVal = 255;
                if (newVal == 0) { lightState = 0; pwmOveride = 0; } else { currentPWM = newVal; pwmOveride = 1; }
                analogWrite(pwmPin, currentPWM);
              }
              printNow = 1;
              String stateStr = (pwmOveride == 1) ? "MANUAL OVERRIDE" : (lightState == 0 ? "OFF" : (lightState == 1 ? "MIN" : (lightState == 2 ? "LOW" : (lightState == 3 ? "MED" : "HIGH"))));
              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:application/json\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n{\"state\":\"" + stateStr + "\", \"pwm\":" + String(currentPWM) + "}");
            } else if (header.indexOf("GET /history") >= 0) {
              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:text/html\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");
              String historyTemplate = R"rawliteral(<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta name='viewport' content='width=device-width, initial-scale=1'><title>Battery History</title><script src='https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js'></script><style>body { font-family: Helvetica; text-align: center; background: #121212; color: #fff; padding-top: 20px;} .chart-container { width: 90%; max-width: 600px; margin: auto; background: #1e1e1e; padding: 15px; border-radius: 10px;} .btn-back { background-color: #555; color: white; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 20px; text-decoration: none; display: inline-block; margin-top: 20px;} </style></head><body><h2>Battery History</h2><div class='chart-container'><canvas id='batteryChart'></canvas></div><br><a href='/' class='btn-back'>Back to Lamp</a><script>fetch('/history').then(r=>r.json()).then(data=>{const ctx=document.getElementById('batteryChart');new Chart(ctx,{type:'line',data:{labels:data.map(d=>new Date(d.ts*1000).toLocaleTimeString()),datasets:[{label:'Battery %',data:data.map(d=>d.p),fill:true,backgroundColor:'rgba(33, 216, 246, 0.2)',borderColor:'#21d8f6',tension:0.3}]}});});</script></body></html>)rawliteral";
              client.print(historyTemplate);
            } else if (header.indexOf("GET /settings ") >= 0) {
              String networkListHTML = "";
              for (int i = 0; i < savedNetworks.size(); i++) {
                networkListHTML += "<li style='background:#333; margin:8px auto; padding:10px 15px; border-radius:5px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; max-width:300px;'>";
                networkListHTML += "<span>" + savedNetworks[i].ssid + "</span>";
                networkListHTML += "<button class='btn btn-off' style='padding:6px 12px; font-size:14px; margin:0;' onclick='deleteNetwork(" + String(i) + ")'>X</button></li>";
              }
              if (savedNetworks.empty()) networkListHTML = "<p style='color:#aaa;'>No networks saved yet.</p>";
              client.print("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-type:text/html\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n");
